<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,minimum-scale=1,user-scalable=no,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>NOT IN PARIS</title>
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="NOT IN PARIS">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#080808">
<meta name="color-scheme" content="dark">
<style>:root{color-scheme:dark only}
/* Skeleton loader */
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:-200% 0}100%{background-position:200% 0}}
.skel-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a1a1a 25%,#252525 50%,#1a1a1a 75%);background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.4s infinite}
.skel-meta{padding:10px 14px 12px;background:#141414}
.skel-line{height:10px;border-radius:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a1a1a 25%,#252525 50%,#1a1a1a 75%);background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.4s infinite;margin-bottom:8px}
.skel-line.wide{width:70%}
.skel-line.narrow{width:40%;height:7px}

/* Responsive scaling */
html { font-size: clamp(13px, 3.5vw, 16px); }
.nav-brand { font-size: clamp(13px, 3.8vw, 17px) !important; }
.pc-name { font-size: clamp(16px, 4.5vw, 22px) !important; }
.btn { font-size: clamp(14px, 4vw, 20px) !important; padding: clamp(12px, 3vw, 16px) !important; }
.fi { font-size: clamp(13px, 3.5vw, 15px) !important; padding: clamp(10px, 2.5vw, 13px) 15px !important; }
.cnt-val { font-size: clamp(20px, 5vw, 26px) !important; }
.stat-n { font-size: clamp(26px, 7vw, 36px) !important; }
.pc { flex: 0 0 clamp(220px, calc(100vw - 60px), 320px) !important; }
.carousel { padding: clamp(10px, 2vw, 16px) 0 0 !important; }
.bottom-sheet { padding: 0 clamp(12px, 4vw, 18px) 60px !important; }
/* Safe area for notched phones */
.bottom-sheet { padding-bottom: max(60px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 60px)) !important; }
.nav { padding: 7px clamp(10px, 3vw, 14px) !important; }
</style>

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* GLOBAL: ALL text white, override everything */
*{color:#F5F2EC!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#F5F2EC!important}
/* White-background elements → black text */
.btn,.btn *,.ab,.ab *,
.t-card-head,.t-card-head *,
.tk-head,.tk-head *,
.qr-go,.qr-go *{
  color:#080808!important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color:#080808!important;
}
/* Accent colors */
.badge.p,.badge.p *{color:var(--gold)!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(--gold)!important}
.badge.a,.badge.a *{color:var(--green)!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(--green)!important}
.badge.r,.badge.r *{color:var(--red)!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(--red)!important}
.badge.f,.badge.f *{color:var(--blue)!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(--blue)!important}
.badge.u,.badge.u *{color:#888!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#888!important}
.err{color:var(--red)!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(--red)!important}
.c-hint.ok{color:var(--green)!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(--green)!important}
.mb-name{color:#5a8a3a!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#5a8a3a!important}
/* Input placeholders stay grey */
input::placeholder,textarea::placeholder{
  color:#555!important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color:#555!important;
}
/* Autofill */
input:-webkit-autofill,input:-webkit-autofill:focus{
  -webkit-box-shadow:0 0 0 1000px #1a1a1a inset!important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color:#F5F2EC!important;
}

/* CV font loaded separately */

:root{–black:#080808;–white:#F5F2EC;–grey:#141414;–mid:#1e1e1e;–dim:#555;–green:#4CAF50;–gold:#FFD700;–red:#FF4500;–blue:#4A90E2}

}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#080808;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;color:#F5F2EC}
#app{position:fixed;inset:0;overflow:hidden;background:#080808}
.screen{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#080808;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .28s ease;pointer-events:none;visibility:hidden}
.screen.active{transform:translateX(0)!important;pointer-events:auto;visibility:visible;z-index:5}
input,textarea,select{color:var(–white)!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–white)!important;caret-color:var(–white)}
input::placeholder,textarea::placeholder{color:#333!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#333!important}
input:-webkit-autofill,input:-webkit-autofill:hover,input:-webkit-autofill:focus{-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–white)!important;-webkit-box-shadow:0 0 0 1000px #0a0a0a inset!important}
.nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;background:rgba(8,8,8,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid #1a1a1a;padding:7px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:6px}
.nav-brand{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:15px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#F5F2EC!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#F5F2EC!important}
.nb{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#aaa;background:none;border:1px solid #333;padding:5px 9px;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.nb:hover,.nb:active{color:var(–white);border-color:#ccc}
.nb.gold{color:var(–gold);border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.3)}
.f{margin-bottom:14px}
.f label{display:block;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.fi{width:100%;background:#1a1a1a;border:1px solid #333;border-radius:3px;padding:13px 15px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:15px;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;-webkit-appearance:none;color:#F5F2EC!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#F5F2EC!important}
.fi:focus{border-color:#ccc}
.ai{width:100%;background:#141414;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:3px;padding:12px 14px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:14px;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;-webkit-appearance:none}
.ai:focus{border-color:#ccc}
.at{width:100%;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #303030;border-radius:3px;padding:12px 14px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:13px;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;resize:none;line-height:1.6}
.at:focus{border-color:#ccc}
.btn{width:100%;background:#F5F2EC;color:#080808;-webkit-text-fill-color:#080808;border:none;border-radius:3px;padding:16px;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:3px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;margin-top:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px}
.btn:active{transform:scale(.98);background:#ddd}
.btn:disabled{background:#252525;color:#ccc;cursor:not-allowed}
.btn-sm{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#ccc;background:none;border:1px solid #252525;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s}
.btn-sm:hover{color:var(–white);border-color:#ccc}
.lnk{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#ccc;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:3px;margin-top:12px}
.err{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–red);letter-spacing:1px;text-align:center;min-height:18px;margin-bottom:8px}
.spin-el{width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-top-color:#000;border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;flex-shrink:0}
.page-spin{width:24px;height:24px;border:2px solid #1a1a1a;border-top-color:var(–white);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;margin:32px auto}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.2}}
.badge{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.badge.p{background:rgba(255,215,0,.1);color:var(–gold);border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.3)}
.badge.a{background:rgba(76,175,80,.1);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.3)}
.badge.r{background:rgba(255,69,0,.1);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3)}
.badge.u{background:rgba(100,100,100,.1);color:#ccc;border:1px solid #222}
.badge.f{background:rgba(74,144,226,.1);color:var(–blue);border:1px solid rgba(74,144,226,.3)}
.card{background:#141414;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden}
.card-h{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:11px 13px;cursor:pointer;gap:8px}
.card-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:19px;color:var(–white);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1}
.card-meta{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;margin-top:3px;line-height:1.7}
.card-body{display:none;padding:0 13px 13px;flex-direction:column;gap:7px}
.card-body.open{display:flex}
.card-det{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;line-height:2;padding:6px 0;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a}
.act-btn{padding:10px;border-radius:3px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;cursor:pointer;border:none;text-align:center;transition:all .2s}
.act-btn.approve{background:rgba(76,175,80,.1);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.25)}
.act-btn.reject{background:rgba(255,69,0,.07);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.2)}
.code-box{background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.2);border-radius:3px;padding:9px 13px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(–gold);letter-spacing:3px;text-align:center}
.info-box{background:#07111a;border:1px solid #122030;border-left:4px solid var(–blue);border-radius:3px;padding:12px 15px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:11px;color:#90b0d0;line-height:1.9;white-space:pre-line}
.note-box{background:#0d0d0d;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-left:3px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:3px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#ccc;line-height:1.8;display:none}
.empty{text-align:center;padding:32px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2}
.bottom-sheet{
position:fixed;
bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
background:#080808;
border-top:1px solid #2a2a2a;
border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;
padding:0 18px 60px;
z-index:20;
transform:translateY(calc(100% - 88px));
transition:transform .38s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
max-height:92vh;
overflow-y:auto;
-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
box-shadow:0 -8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.7);
}
.bottom-sheet.open{transform:translateY(0)}
.sheet-pill{width:40px;height:4px;background:#333;border-radius:2px;margin:12px auto 6px;transition:background .2s;flex-shrink:0}
.bottom-sheet.open .sheet-pill{background:#666}
.sheet-hint-txt{text-align:center;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:14px;transition:color .3s;padding-bottom:4px}
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(–white);color:var(–black);font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:10px 18px;border-radius:3px;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
.toast.show{opacity:1}
.carousel{padding:16px 0 0;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
#s-customer .nav~*{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.c-label{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:3px;padding:0 18px 12px}
.c-vp{overflow:hidden;padding:0 18px;touch-action:pan-y}
.c-track{display:flex;gap:10px;transition:transform .42s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);will-change:transform}
.pc{flex:0 0 calc(100vw - 60px);max-width:320px;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;background:#111;transition:transform .15s}
.pc:active{transform:scale(.985)}
.pc img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;object-fit:cover;display:block;pointer-events:none;user-select:none}
.pc-meta{padding:10px 14px 12px;background:var(–grey);border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a}
.pc-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:1px;color:#F5F2EC!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#F5F2EC!important;line-height:1}
.pc-row{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.pc-genre{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;border:1px solid #252525;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:2px}
.pc-date{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc}
.pc-ring{position:absolute;inset:0;border:2px solid var(–white);border-radius:3px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;pointer-events:none}
.pc.sel .pc-ring{opacity:1}
.pc-chk{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:var(–white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;transform:scale(.5);transition:all .25s;pointer-events:none;font-size:11px;color:var(–black);font-weight:700}
.pc.sel .pc-chk{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}
.c-dots{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:5px;padding:12px 0 0}
.c-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#252525;transition:all .3s;cursor:pointer}
.c-dot.active{background:var(–white);width:20px;border-radius:3px}
.c-hint{text-align:center;padding:8px 18px 0;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:2px;min-height:26px;transition:color .3s}
.c-hint.ok{color:var(–green)}
.bottom-sheet{background:var(–black);border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:12px 12px 0 0;padding:0 18px 80px;margin-top:8px}
.sheet-pill{width:32px;height:3px;background:#252525;border-radius:2px;margin:12px auto 8px;transition:background .3s}
.sheet-hint-txt{text-align:center;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:14px;transition:color .3s}
.count-row{display:flex;align-items:center;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #252525;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.cnt-btn{width:48px;height:48px;background:none;border:none;color:var(–white);font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .15s}
.cnt-btn:active{background:#202020}
.cnt-val{flex:1;text-align:center;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:26px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#F5F2EC!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#F5F2EC!important}
.evt-sel{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #252525;border-radius:3px;padding:12px 15px;min-height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(–white)}
.rules-wrap{background:#07111a;border:1px solid #1a4070;border-left:4px solid var(–blue);border-radius:3px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;display:none}
.rules-text{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:10px;color:#90b0d0;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:12px;white-space:pre-line}
.rules-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #122030}
.rules-row input{width:18px!important;height:18px!important;accent-color:var(–blue);cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;-webkit-text-fill-color:unset!important}
.rules-label{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#90b0d0;letter-spacing:.5px;line-height:1.6}
.t-card{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:12px}
.t-card-head{background:var(–white);color:var(–black);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–black);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.t-card-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:2px}
.t-card-body{padding:12px 16px}
.t-card-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:7px}
.t-card-lbl{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:2px}
.t-card-val{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(–white);text-align:right}
.t-card-qr{background:#050505;padding:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.member-bar{background:#07100a;border-bottom:1px solid #152010;padding:9px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
.mb-name{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#5a8a3a;letter-spacing:1px}
.a-tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid #1a1a1a;overflow-x:auto}
.a-tab{flex:1;min-width:50px;padding:11px 3px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3px;text-align:center;color:#ccc;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.a-tab.active{color:var(–white);border-bottom-color:var(–white)}
.a-panel{display:none;padding:16px}.a-panel.active{display:block}
.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
.stat{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;padding:12px 4px;text-align:center}
.stat-n{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:36px;line-height:1;color:var(–white)}
.stat-n.o{color:var(–red)}.stat-n.g{color:var(–green)}.stat-n.gold{color:var(–gold)}.stat-n.b{color:var(–blue)}
.stat-l{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:6px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:2px}
.sec{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#aaa;margin-bottom:8px}
.hr{border:none;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a;margin:16px 0}
.ag{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.ag .ai{margin-bottom:0}
.ab{width:100%;background:var(–white);color:var(–black);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:3px;padding:12px;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:2px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;margin-bottom:7px}
.ab:disabled{background:#252525;color:#ccc;cursor:not-allowed}
.ab.sec{background:none;color:var(–white);border:1px solid #303030;font-size:11px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;letter-spacing:1px}
.add-wrap{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px}
.uz{border:2px dashed #303030;border-radius:3px;padding:20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:#0a0a0a;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px}
.uz input{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;width:100%;height:100%}
.pp{display:none;margin-bottom:10px;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.pp img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.pp-rm{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);border:1px solid #444;color:var(–white);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.ec{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:10px;overflow:hidden}
.ec-top{display:flex;align-items:stretch}
.ec-thumb{width:54px;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;background:#0a0a0a}
.ec-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.ec-ph{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:68px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.ec-info{flex:1;padding:10px 12px 8px}
.ec-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:17px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1;color:var(–white)}
.ec-sub{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;color:#ccc;margin-top:2px}
.cap-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;margin-top:6px}
.cap-bg{flex:1;height:2px;background:#252525;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}
.cap-fill{height:100%;background:var(–white);border-radius:2px;transition:width .5s}
.cap-fill.warn{background:var(–gold)}.cap-fill.full{background:var(–red)}
.cap-txt{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;color:#ccc;white-space:nowrap}
.ec-acts{display:flex;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a}
.ec-act{flex:1;padding:8px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:1px;color:#aaa;background:none;border:none;border-right:1px solid #1a1a1a;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.ec-act:last-child{border-right:none}
.ec-act:hover{color:var(–white);background:#1a1a1a}
.ec-act.del:hover{color:var(–red)}
.chips{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px}
.chip{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #333;color:#aaa;background:none;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s}
.chip.active{color:var(–white);border-color:#ccc;background:#1a1a1a}
.chip.active.p{border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.4);color:var(–gold)}
.chip.active.a{border-color:rgba(76,175,80,.4);color:var(–green)}
.f-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.f-row select{flex:1;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #252525;border-radius:3px;padding:8px 11px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;outline:none;-webkit-appearance:none}
.qr-inp-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}
.qr-inp-row input{flex:1;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #303030;border-radius:3px;padding:12px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:13px;outline:none;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:3px}
.qr-go{background:var(–white);color:var(–black);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:3px;padding:12px 14px;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:15px;cursor:pointer}
.qr-res{display:none;border-radius:3px;padding:16px;margin-top:10px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.9;text-align:center}
.qr-res.v{background:rgba(76,175,80,.07);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.2)}
.qr-res.i{background:rgba(255,69,0,.07);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.2)}
.qr-res.u{background:rgba(100,100,100,.07);color:#ccc;border:1px solid rgba(100,100,100,.2)}
.qr-big{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:36px;letter-spacing:3px;display:block;margin-bottom:5px}
@media(min-width:768px){#app{max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;box-shadow:0 0 80px rgba(0,0,0,.9)}body{background:#030303}}
@media(min-width:1024px){#app{max-width:420px}}

/* Input fixes - ONLY target form inputs, not card content */
.fi {
background: #1a1a1a !important;
color: #F5F2EC !important;
-webkit-text-fill-color: #F5F2EC !important;
caret-color: #F5F2EC !important;
}
.fi::placeholder {
color: #555 !important;
-webkit-text-fill-color: #555 !important;
}
.fi:-webkit-autofill, .fi:-webkit-autofill:focus {
-webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 1000px #1a1a1a inset !important;
-webkit-text-fill-color: #F5F2EC !important;
}
.ai {
color: #F5F2EC !important;
-webkit-text-fill-color: #F5F2EC !important;
caret-color: #F5F2EC !important;
}
.ai::placeholder { color: #555 !important; -webkit-text-fill-color: #555 !important; }
.ai:-webkit-autofill { -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 1000px #0a0a0a inset !important; -webkit-text-fill-color: #F5F2EC !important; }
.at { color: #F5F2EC !important; -webkit-text-fill-color: #F5F2EC !important; caret-color: #F5F2EC !important; }
.at::placeholder { color: #555 !important; -webkit-text-fill-color: #555 !important; }

@keyframes slideUp{from{transform:translateY(100%)}to{transform:translateY(0)}}
#authModal.show{display:flex!important}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div id="app">
  <!-- Global back button -->
  <button id="globalBackBtn" onclick="goBack()" style="display:none;position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:18px;z-index:200;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(15,15,15,.95);border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:#F5F2EC;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.5)">←</button>

<!-- LOGIN -->

<div class="screen" id="s-login">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:60px 24px 0">
    <div style="font-family:'CV','Arial Black',sans-serif;font-size:46px;letter-spacing:3px;word-spacing:4px;color:#F5F2EC;text-align:center;line-height:1;margin-bottom:10px">NOT IN PARIS</div>
    <div id="loginSlogan" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:44px">MEMBERS ONLY</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:0 24px 60px">
    <div class="f"><label id="lbEmail">E-POSTA</label><input class="fi" type="email" id="loginEmail" placeholder="e-posta@adresin.com" autocomplete="email" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')document.getElementById('loginPw').focus()"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbPw">ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="loginPw" placeholder="Şifreniz" autocomplete="current-password" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()"></div>
    <div class="err" id="loginErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="loginBtn" onclick="doLogin()"><span id="loginBtnTxt">GİRİŞ YAP</span></button>
    <div class="lnk" id="loginApplyLink" onclick="G('s-register')" style="margin-top:16px">Hesabın yok mu? Başvur →</div>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:28px">
      <button onclick="G('s-admin-login')" style="background:none;border:none;color:#1a1a1a;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px">admin ↗</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- REGISTER -->

<div class="screen" id="s-register">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand" id="regNavBrand">BAŞVURU</span>
    <button class="nb" onclick="G('s-login')">← GERİ</button>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:24px 24px 60px">
    <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:24px" id="regSub">Başvurunuz incelendikten sonra üyelik kodunuz iletilecek.</div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbRef">REFERANS KODU <span style="color:#555;font-size:8px">(OPSİYONEL)</span></label><input class="fi" type="text" id="refInput" placeholder="NIP-MBR-XXXXXX" maxlength="14" oninput="this.value=this.value.toUpperCase();checkRef(this.value)"></div>
    <div id="refOk" style="display:none;background:#080f06;border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.2);border-left:3px solid var(--green);border-radius:3px;padding:10px 14px;margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:12px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--green)"></div>
    <div id="refErr" style="display:none;background:#0f0806;border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.2);border-left:3px solid var(--red);border-radius:3px;padding:10px 14px;margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:12px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--red)"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbName">İSİM SOYAD</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="regName" placeholder="Adınız ve soyadınız"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbRegEmail">E-POSTA</label><input class="fi" type="email" id="regEmail" placeholder="e-posta@adresin.com" autocomplete="email"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbRegPw">ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="regPw" placeholder="En az 8 karakter" autocomplete="new-password"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbPhone">TELEFON</label><input class="fi" type="tel" id="regPhone" placeholder="+90 5xx xxx xx xx" oninput="normalizePhone(this)"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>INSTAGRAM</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="regInsta" placeholder="@kullaniciadi"></div>
    <div class="err" id="regErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="regBtn" onclick="doRegister()"><span id="regBtnTxt">BAŞVUR</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PENDING -->

<div class="screen" id="s-pending">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100%;padding:40px 24px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-size:52px;margin-bottom:20px">⏳</div>
    <div id="pendingTitle" style="font-family:'CV',sans-serif;font-size:40px;letter-spacing:4px;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:12px">BAŞVURUNUZ ALINDI</div>
    <div id="pendingSub" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2.2;margin-bottom:32px">İnceleme sonrası üyelik kodunuz iletilecek.</div>
    <button class="btn-sm" onclick="G('s-login')">← Ana Sayfa</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CUSTOMER -->

<div class="screen active" id="s-customer" style="overflow:hidden">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand" id="brandTap" onclick="adminTap()">NOT IN PARIS</span>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:8px">
      <button id="flagTR" onclick="setLang('tr')" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;opacity:1;padding:2px;line-height:1">🇹🇷</button>
      <button id="flagEN" onclick="setLang('en')" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;opacity:.35;padding:2px;line-height:1">🇬🇧</button>
      <button id="flagRU" onclick="setLang('ru')" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;opacity:.35;padding:2px;line-height:1">🇷🇺</button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;align-items:center">
      <button class="nb" onclick="refreshApp()" style="padding:4px 7px;font-size:12px" title="Yenile">↻</button>
      <button class="nb" id="profileBtn" onclick="openProfile()" style="display:none">👤</button>
      <button class="nb gold" onclick="openTickets()">🎫</button>
      <button class="nb" id="outBtn" onclick="doLogout()">GİRİŞ YAP</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="member-bar" id="memberBar" style="display:none">
    <span class="mb-name" id="mbName">—</span><span id="nightsBadge" style="display:none;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#4a7a3a;margin-left:8px;letter-spacing:1px"></span>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:#3a5a2a" id="refCount"></span>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:#3a5a2a;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:2px" id="refCopyBtn" onclick="copyRef()">🔗 Referans linkini kopyala</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="carousel">
    <div class="c-label" id="cLabel">// YAKLAŞAN ETKİNLİKLER — KAYDIRIN</div>
    <div class="c-vp" id="cVP"><div class="c-track" id="cTrack"><div class="page-spin"></div></div></div>
    <div class="c-dots" id="cDots"></div>
    <div class="c-hint" id="cHint">Rezervasyon için bir etkinliğe dokunun ↑</div>
  </div>
  <div class="bottom-sheet" id="resSheet">
    <div style="padding:0;cursor:pointer" onclick="openSheet()">
      <div class="sheet-pill" id="sheetPill"></div>
      <div class="sheet-hint-txt" id="sheetHint">↑ REZERVASYON FORMU</div>
    </div>

```
<div class="note-box" id="evtNote"></div>
<div class="rules-wrap" id="rulesWrap">
  <div class="rules-text" id="rulesText"></div>
  <label class="rules-row">
    <input type="checkbox" id="rulesCheck">
    <span class="rules-label" id="rulesLabel">🔵 Etkinlik kurallarını okudum ve kabul ediyorum</span>
  </label>
</div>
<div class="f"><label id="lbSelEvt">SEÇİLEN ETKİNLİK</label>
  <div class="evt-sel">
    <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:#ccc;font-style:italic" id="evtSelNone">Yukarıdan bir etkinlik seçin</span>
    <span style="width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--white);flex-shrink:0;display:none" id="evtSelDot"></span>
    <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--white);line-height:1.5;display:none" id="evtSelTxt"></span>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="f">
  <label id="lbFName">1. KİŞİ — SİZ <span style="font-size:7px;color:#555;letter-spacing:1px">(ÜYE)</span></label>
  <input class="fi" type="text" id="fName" placeholder="Adınız" style="opacity:.7">
</div>
<div class="f">
  <label id="lbFPhone">TELEFON <span style="font-size:7px;color:#555;letter-spacing:1px">(ÜYE)</span></label>
  <input class="fi" type="tel" id="fPhone" placeholder="+90" style="opacity:.7" oninput="normalizePhone(this)">
</div>
<div id="guestNamesWrap"></div>
<div class="f"><label id="lbGuests">KİŞİ SAYISI</label>
  <div class="count-row">
    <button class="cnt-btn" onclick="chgCnt(-1)">−</button>
    <div class="cnt-val" id="cntVal">1</div>
    <button class="cnt-btn" onclick="chgCnt(1)">+</button>
  </div>
</div>
<button class="btn" id="subBtn" onclick="doRes()"><span id="subBtnTxt">REZERVASYON TALEBİ GÖNDER</span></button>
<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:20px;padding-bottom:8px">
  <button onclick="G('s-admin-login')" style="background:none;border:none;color:#222;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:7px;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px">admin</button>
</div>
```

  </div>
</div>

<!-- TICKETS -->

<div class="screen" id="s-tickets">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand" id="myTicketsTitle">BİLETLERİM</span><span id="ticketsNightCount" style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#4a7a3a;letter-spacing:1px;margin-left:8px"></span>
    <button class="nb" id="ticketsBackBtn" onclick="G('s-customer')">← GERİ</button>
  </div>
  <div id="ticketsList" style="padding:16px 16px 60px"><div class="page-spin"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- PROFİL -->

<div class="screen" id="s-profile">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand">PROFİLİM</span>
    <button class="nb" onclick="G('s-customer')">← GERİ</button>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:20px 18px 60px">
    <!-- Skor kartı -->
    <div id="profileScoreCard" style="background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:6px;padding:20px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:20px">
      <div id="profileScoreNum" style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:56px;line-height:1;color:#F5F2EC"></div>
      <div id="profileScoreLabel" style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:4px"></div>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:20px;margin-top:16px">
        <div style="text-align:center">
          <div id="profileNights" style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:28px;color:#F5F2EC">0</div>
          <div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:1px">GECE</div>
        </div>
        <div style="width:1px;background:#1a1a1a"></div>
        <div style="text-align:center">
          <div id="profileRefs" style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:28px;color:#F5F2EC">0</div>
          <div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:1px">REFERANS</div>
        </div>
        <div style="width:1px;background:#1a1a1a"></div>
        <div style="text-align:center">
          <div id="profileRefLeft" style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:28px;color:#F5F2EC">0</div>
          <div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:1px">KALAN DAVET</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Üyelik kodu -->
    <div id="profileCode" style="background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.2);border-radius:3px;padding:12px 16px;text-align:center;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:20px;cursor:pointer" onclick="copyRef()"></div>
    <!-- Bilgi düzenleme -->
    <div style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#aaa;margin-bottom:12px">BİLGİLERİM</div>
    <div class="f"><label>İSİM SOYAD</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="profileName" placeholder="Adınız"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>TELEFON</label><input class="fi" type="tel" id="profilePhone" placeholder="+90" oninput="normalizePhone(this)"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>INSTAGRAM</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="profileInsta" placeholder="@kullaniciadi"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>YENİ ŞİFRE <span style="font-size:8px;color:#555">(BOŞ BIRAKINCA DEĞİŞMEZ)</span></label><input class="fi" type="password" id="profilePw" placeholder="En az 8 karakter"></div>
    <div class="err" id="profileErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" onclick="saveProfile()"><span>BİLGİLERİ GÜNCELLE</span></button>
    <!-- Geçmiş geceler -->
    <div style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#aaa;margin:24px 0 12px">GEÇMİŞ GECELERİM</div>
    <div id="profileHistory"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN LOGIN -->

<div class="screen" id="s-admin-login">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100%;padding:40px 28px">
    <div style="font-family:'CV',sans-serif;font-size:42px;letter-spacing:4px;margin-bottom:6px">ADMİN</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:36px">NOT IN PARIS</div>
    <div style="width:100%;max-width:300px">
      <div class="f"><label>KULLANICI ADI</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="adminUser" autocomplete="off"></div>
      <div class="f"><label>ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="adminPw" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doAdminLogin()"></div>
      <div class="err" id="adminLoginErr"></div>
      <button class="btn" onclick="doAdminLogin()">GİRİŞ YAP</button>
      <div class="lnk" onclick="G('s-login')" style="margin-top:12px">← Geri</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN -->

<div class="screen" id="s-admin">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand">ADMİN</span>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px">
      <span style="width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);animation:pulse 2s infinite;display:inline-block"></span>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(--green)">CANLI</span>
    </div>
    <button class="nb" onclick="G('s-login')">← ÇIKIŞ</button>
    <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px">ADMIN</span>
  </div>
  <div class="a-tabs">
    <button class="a-tab active" onclick="aTab('ov')">GENEL</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('mb')">ÜYELER</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('ev')">ETKİNLİK</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('rs')">REZERVASYON</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('qr')">QR TARA</button>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel active" id="ap-ov">
    <div class="stats-row" id="admStats"></div>
    <div class="sec">SON BAŞVURULAR</div><div id="recM"></div>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">SON REZERVASYONLAR</div><div id="recR"></div>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">DUYURU</div>
    <textarea class="at" id="annTxt" style="height:80px"></textarea>
    <button class="ab" onclick="saveAnn()">DUYURUYU GÜNCELLE</button>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">ADMİN BİLGİLERİ</div>
    <div class="add-wrap">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="newAdminUser" placeholder="Yeni kullanıcı adı">
      <input type="password" class="ai" id="newAdminPw" placeholder="Yeni şifre">
      <button class="ab sec" onclick="saveAdminCreds()">BİLGİLERİ GÜNCELLE</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-mb">
    <div class="stats-row" id="mStats"></div>
    <div class="chips" id="mChips">
      <button class="chip active" onclick="setMC(this,'')">TÜMÜ</button>
      <button class="chip p" onclick="setMC(this,'pending')">BEKLEYEN</button>
      <button class="chip a" onclick="setMC(this,'approved')">ONAYLANDI</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setMC(this,'rejected')">REDDEDİLDİ</button>
      <button class="chip f" onclick="setMC(this,'frozen')">DONDURULDU</button>
    </div>
    <div id="mList"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-ev">
    <div class="sec">YENİ ETKİNLİK EKLE</div>
    <div class="add-wrap">
      <div class="uz" id="uZone"><input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="onPoster(event)">
        <div style="font-size:24px;margin-bottom:4px">🖼️</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc">AFİŞ YÜKLE · 4:5</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pp" id="pPrev"><img id="pPrevImg"><button class="pp-rm" onclick="rmP()">✕</button></div>
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neName" placeholder="Sanatçı adı">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neGenre" placeholder="Müzik türü">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neSub" placeholder="Alt başlık">
      <div class="ag"><input type="date" class="ai" id="neDate"><input type="time" class="ai" id="neTime" value="22:00"></div>
      <input type="number" class="ai" id="neCap" placeholder="Kapasite" value="100">
      <div class="sec" style="font-size:11px;margin-top:6px;margin-bottom:4px">ETKİNLİK KURALLARI</div>
      <textarea class="at" id="neRules" placeholder="Her satır ayrı madde..." style="height:80px"></textarea>
      <button class="ab sec" onclick="loadLastNote()" style="margin-bottom:6px">↙ SON NOTLARI YÜKLE</button>
      <button class="ab" id="addEvtBtn" onclick="addEvt()">ETKİNLİK OLUŞTUR</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sec">MEVCUT ETKİNLİKLER</div>
    <div id="evtList"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-rs">
    <div class="f-row" style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <select id="filterEvt" onchange="renderRes()"></select>
      <button class="ab sec" style="width:38px;padding:0;flex-shrink:0;font-size:15px;margin:0" onclick="renderRes()">↻</button>
    </div>
    <div class="chips" id="rChips">
      <button class="chip active" onclick="setRC(this,'')">TÜMÜ</button>
      <button class="chip p" onclick="setRC(this,'pending')">BEKLEYEN</button>
      <button class="chip a" onclick="setRC(this,'approved')">ONAYLANDI</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setRC(this,'rejected')">REDDEDİLDİ</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setRC(this,'used')">KULLANILDI</button>
    </div>
    <div id="rList"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-qr">
    <div style="background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid var(--mid);border-radius:3px;padding:24px 16px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px">
      <video id="qrVideo" style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;object-fit:cover;display:none;background:#000;border-radius:3px"></video>
      <canvas id="qrCanvas" style="display:none"></canvas>
      <div id="camOff">
        <div style="font-size:44px;margin-bottom:10px">📷</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;margin-bottom:14px">KAMERA İLE OKUT VEYA KOD GİR</div>
        <button class="qr-go" style="width:100%;padding:14px" onclick="startCam()">KAMERAYI AÇ</button>
      </div>
      <div id="camOn" style="display:none;padding:8px 0">
        <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:8px">● TARANIYOR...</div>
        <button class="qr-go" style="background:var(--red);color:#fff;width:100%;padding:10px" onclick="stopCam()">✕ KAPAT</button>
      </div>
      <div class="qr-inp-row">
        <input type="text" id="qrInput" placeholder="NIP-XXXXXX" maxlength="12" oninput="this.value=this.value.toUpperCase()" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')scanQR()">
        <button class="qr-go" onclick="scanQR()">TARA</button>
      </div>
      <div class="qr-res" id="qrRes"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:7px;color:#1a1a1a;text-align:center;line-height:2.5">Her QR yalnızca bir kez kullanılabilir.</div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- AUTH MODAL -->

<div id="authModal" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center">
  <div style="background:#080808;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;width:100%;max-width:480px;padding:28px 24px 48px;animation:slideUp .3s ease">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:24px">
      <div style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:32px;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:8px">NOT IN PARIS</div>
      <div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:10px;color:#aaa;letter-spacing:2px">Rezervasyon için giriş yapın</div>
    </div>
    <div class="f"><label id="modalLbEmail">E-POSTA</label><input class="fi" type="email" id="modalEmail" placeholder="e-posta@adresin.com" autocomplete="email"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="modalLbPw">ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="modalPw" placeholder="Şifreniz" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doModalLogin()"></div>
    <div class="err" id="modalErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="modalLoginBtn" onclick="doModalLogin()" style="margin-bottom:10px"><span id="modalBtnTxt">GİRİŞ YAP</span></button>
    <div class="lnk" onclick="closeAuthModal();G('s-register')" style="margin-bottom:10px">Hesabın yok mu? Başvur →</div>
    <div class="lnk" onclick="closeAuthModal()" style="color:#555">Vazgeç</div>
  </div>
</div>

})();

const _SB = supabase.createClient('https://diqparjrtvvfxvwxebov.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImRpcXBhcmpydHZ2Znh2d3hlYm92Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM5Mzc3OTMsImV4cCI6MjA4OTUxMzc5M30.pNI2yU6LDG8583HBPq-5puxkpEVEAYwhGp9ibJ1WBsI');

// ── STATE ──
var me=null, events=[], selEvt=null, cnt=2, ci=0, sx=0, drag=false;
var refM=null, mF='', rF='', newP=null, resSub=null;
var camStream=null, camTimer=null;
var lang = localStorage.getItem('nip_lang') || 'tr';

// ── LANGUAGE ──
var LANG = {
  tr: {
    loginBtn:'GİRİŞ YAP', email:'E-POSTA', pw:'ŞİFRE',
    noAccount:'Hesabın yok mu? Başvur →',

    resBtn:'REZERVASYON TALEBİ GÖNDER',
    rules:'🔵 Etkinlik kurallarını okudum ve kabul ediyorum',
    tickets:'BİLETLERİM', back:'← GERİ', out:'ÇIKIŞ',
    copyRef:'🔗 Referans linkini kopyala', refLeft:' referans hakkı',
    scrollHint:'↓ REZERVASYON İÇİN KAYDIRIN',

  },

    applyBtn:'APPLY',
    pendingTitle:'APPLICATION RECEIVED',
    pendingSub:'Your membership code will be sent once approved.',
    upcoming:'// UPCOMING EVENTS — SWIPE',
