    selAbove:'Select an event above',
    selEvt:'SELECTED EVENT', guests:'NUMBER OF GUESTS',
    resBtn:'REQUEST RESERVATION',
    rules:'🔵 I have read and agree to the event rules',
    tickets:'MY TICKETS', back:'← BACK', out:'OUT',
    copyRef:'🔗 Copy referral link', refLeft:' referrals left',
    scrollHint:'↓ SCROLL TO RESERVE',
    errInvalid:'Invalid email or password',
    errPending:'Your application is still under review',
    errRejected:'Your application was not approved',
    errFrozen:'Your account has been frozen',
    errFields:'Please fill all fields',
    errPw:'Password must be at least 8 characters',
    errRef:'Invalid referral code',
    welcome:'Welcome! Your membership is approved.'
  },
  ru: {
    loginBtn:'ВОЙТИ', email:'ЭЛ. ПОЧТА', pw:'ПАРОЛЬ',
    noAccount:'Нет аккаунта? Подать заявку',
    nav:'ЗАЯВКА', sub:'Заявки рассматриваются вручную.',
    ref:'РЕФЕРАЛЬНЫЙ КОД', name:'ИМЯ И ФАМИЛИЯ', phone:'ТЕЛЕФОН',
    applyBtn:'ПОДАТЬ ЗАЯВКУ',
    pendingTitle:'ЗАЯВКА ПОЛУЧЕНА',
    pendingSub:'Ваш код членства будет отправлен после одобрения.',
    upcoming:'// БЛИЖАЙШИЕ СОБЫТИЯ — ЛИСТАЙТЕ',
    tapEvt:'Нажмите на событие для бронирования ↑',
    selAbove:'Выберите событие выше',
    selEvt:'ВЫБРАННОЕ СОБЫТИЕ', guests:'КОЛИЧЕСТВО ГОСТЕЙ',
    resBtn:'ЗАПРОСИТЬ БРОНИРОВАНИЕ',
    rules:'🔵 Я прочитал и согласен с правилами',
    tickets:'МОИ БИЛЕТЫ', back:'← НАЗАД', out:'ВЫХОД',
    copyRef:'🔗 Скопировать реф. ссылку', refLeft:' приглашений',
    scrollHint:'↓ ПРОКРУТИТЕ ДЛЯ БРОНИ',
    errInvalid:'Неверный email или пароль',
    errPending:'Ваша заявка ещё рассматривается',
    errRejected:'Ваша заявка не одобрена',
    errFrozen:'Ваш аккаунт заморожен',
    errFields:'Заполните все поля',
    errPw:'Пароль должен содержать не менее 8 символов',
    errRef:'Неверный реферальный код',
    welcome:'Добро пожаловать! Членство одобрено.'
  }
};

function t(k) { return (LANG[lang] || LANG.tr)[k] || k; }

function setLang(l) {
  lang = l;
  localStorage.setItem('nip_lang', l);
  applyLang();
}

function applyLang() {
  ['TR','EN','RU'].forEach(function(f) {
    var el = document.getElementById('flag' + f);
    if (el) el.style.opacity = lang === f.toLowerCase() ? '1' : '0.35';
  });
  setText('loginBtnTxt', t('loginBtn'));
  setText('loginApplyLink', t('noAccount'));
  setLabel('lbEmail', t('email'));
  setLabel('lbPw', t('pw'));
  setText('regNavBrand', t('nav'));
  setText('regSub', t('sub'));
  setLabel('lbRef', t('ref'));
  setLabel('lbName', t('name'));
  setLabel('lbRegEmail', t('email'));
  setLabel('lbRegPw', t('pw'));
  setLabel('lbPhone', t('phone'));
  setText('regBtnTxt', t('applyBtn'));
  setText('pendingTitle', t('pendingTitle'));
  setText('pendingSub', t('pendingSub'));
  setText('cLabel', t('upcoming'));
  var ch = document.getElementById('cHint');
  if (ch && !ch.classList.contains('ok')) ch.textContent = t('tapEvt');
  setText('sheetHint', t('scrollHint'));
  setText('evtSelNone', t('selAbove'));
  setLabel('lbSelEvt', t('selEvt'));
  setLabel('lbGuests', t('guests'));
  setText('subBtnTxt', t('resBtn'));
  setText('rulesLabel', t('rules'));
  setText('outBtn', t('out'));
  setText('refCopyBtn', t('copyRef'));
  setText('myTicketsTitle', t('tickets'));
  setText('ticketsBackBtn', t('back'));
  if (me) {
    var u = me.referral_used || 0, lim = me.referral_limit || 3;
    setText('refCount', (lim - u) + t('refLeft'));
  }
}

function setText(id, v) { var e = document.getElementById(id); if (e) e.textContent = v; }
function setLabel(id, v) { var e = document.getElementById(id); if (e) e.textContent = v; }

// ── NAVIGATION ──
var _pageStack = [];

function G(id) {
  var current = document.querySelector('.screen.active');
  var currentId = current ? current.id : null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(function(s) { s.classList.remove('active'); });
  var el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (el) { el.classList.add('active'); setTimeout(function() { el.scrollTop = 0; }, 50); }
  // Save current page
  if (id !== 's-login' && id !== 's-register' && id !== 's-pending' && id !== 's-admin-login') {
    localStorage.setItem('nip_page', id);
  }
  // Push to history stack
  if (currentId && currentId !== id) {
    _pageStack.push(currentId);
    if (_pageStack.length > 10) _pageStack.shift();
  }
  // Show/hide back button
  updateBackBtn();
}

function goBack() {
  if (_pageStack.length === 0) return;
  var prev = _pageStack.pop();
  // Don't go back to login screens
  while (_pageStack.length > 0 && (prev === 's-login' || prev === 's-register' || prev === 's-admin-login')) {
    prev = _pageStack.pop();
  }
  if (prev) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(function(s) { s.classList.remove('active'); });
    var el = document.getElementById(prev);
    if (el) { el.classList.add('active'); setTimeout(function(){ el.scrollTop = 0; }, 50); }
    updateBackBtn();
  }
}

function updateBackBtn() {
  var btn = document.getElementById('globalBackBtn');
  if (!btn) return;
  var active = document.querySelector('.screen.active');
  var activeId = active ? active.id : '';
  // Show back button on sub-pages, not on main customer screen
  var showBack = _pageStack.length > 0 && activeId !== 's-customer' && activeId !== 's-admin';
  btn.style.display = showBack ? 'flex' : 'none';
}

// ── BOOT ──
async function boot() {
  applyLang();
  var p = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
  var ref = p.get('ref');
  if (ref) {
    var ri = document.getElementById('refInput');
    if (ri) ri.value = ref.toUpperCase();
    checkRef(ref.toUpperCase());
    G('s-register');
    return;
  }
  // Try to restore session from localStorage (instant, no network)
  var savedMe = localStorage.getItem('nip_me_data');
  if (savedMe) {
    try {
      me = JSON.parse(savedMe);
      var lastPage = localStorage.getItem('nip_page') || 's-customer';
      if (lastPage === 's-admin' || lastPage === 's-admin-login') lastPage = 's-customer';
      enterCustomer(lastPage);
      // Silent background refresh
      _SB.from('members').select('*').eq('id', me.id).single().then(function(res) {
        if (res.data && !res.error && res.data.status === 'approved') {
          me = res.data;
          localStorage.setItem('nip_me_data', JSON.stringify(me));
          localStorage.setItem('nip_me', me.id);
        } else if (res.data && res.data.status !== 'approved') {
          localStorage.removeItem('nip_me_data');
          localStorage.removeItem('nip_me');
          me = null;
          enterGuestMode();
        }
      });
      return;
    } catch(e) {
      localStorage.removeItem('nip_me_data');
    }
  }
  // Fallback: try old nip_me id
  var savedId = localStorage.getItem('nip_me');
  if (savedId) {
    try {
      var res = await _SB.from('members').select('*').eq('id', savedId).eq('status', 'approved').single();
      if (res.data && !res.error) {
        me = res.data;
        localStorage.setItem('nip_me_data', JSON.stringify(me));
        enterCustomer();
        return;
      }
      localStorage.removeItem('nip_me');
    } catch(e) { console.log('Boot error:', e); }
  }
  // No session
  enterGuestMode();
}

async function loadBranding() {
  try {
    var res = await _SB.from('settings').select('key,value').in('key', ['announcement','slogan']);
    if (!res.data) return;
    res.data.forEach(function(row) {
      if (row.key === 'announcement') {
        
        var a2 = document.getElementById('annTxt'); if (a2) a2.value = row.value;
      }
      if (row.key === 'slogan') {
        var sl = document.getElementById('loginSlogan'); if (sl) sl.textContent = row.value;
      }
    });
  } catch(e) {}
}

// ── LOGIN ──
async function doLogin() {
  var email = document.getElementById('loginEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  var pw = document.getElementById('loginPw').value;
  var err = document.getElementById('loginErr');
  err.textContent = '';
  if (!email || !pw) { err.textContent = t('errFields'); return; }
  var btn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span class="spin-el"></span><span>...</span>';
  var pwHash = btoa(pw + email);
  var res = await _SB.from('members').select('*').eq('email', email).eq('password_hash', pwHash).single();
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span id="loginBtnTxt">' + t('loginBtn') + '</span>';
  var data = res.data;
  if (!data) { err.textContent = t('errInvalid'); return; }
  if (data.status === 'pending') { err.textContent = t('errPending'); return; }
  if (data.status === 'rejected') { err.textContent = t('errRejected'); return; }
  if (data.status === 'frozen') { err.textContent = t('errFrozen'); return; }
  localStorage.setItem('nip_me', data.id);
  localStorage.setItem('nip_me_data', JSON.stringify(data));
  me = data;
  // Keep spinner until customer page loads
  btn.innerHTML = '<span class="spin-el"></span><span>YÜKLENİYOR...</span>';
  await enterCustomer();
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span id="loginBtnTxt">' + t('loginBtn') + '</span>';
}

function doLogout() {
  localStorage.removeItem('nip_me');
  localStorage.removeItem('nip_me_data');
  me = null; selEvt = null; cnt = 2; events = [];
  var mb3 = document.getElementById('memberBar'); if (mb3) mb3.style.display = 'none';
  var pb3 = document.getElementById('profileBtn'); if (pb3) pb3.style.display = 'none';
  enterGuestMode();
}

// ── REGISTER ──
var refTimer;
async function checkRef(v) {
  clearTimeout(refTimer);
  var ok = document.getElementById('refOk');
  var er = document.getElementById('refErr');
  if (ok) ok.style.display = 'none';
  if (er) er.style.display = 'none';
  refM = null;
  if (!v || v.length < 10) return;
  refTimer = setTimeout(async function() {
    var res = await _SB.from('members').select('*').eq('member_code', v).eq('status', 'approved').single();
    if (res.data) {
      var used = res.data.referral_used || 0;
      var lim = res.data.referral_limit || 3;
      if (used >= lim) {
        if (er) { er.textContent = 'Bu referans kodunun hakkı dolmuş'; er.style.display = 'block'; }
        refM = null;
      } else {
        refM = res.data;
        if (ok) { ok.textContent = '✓ Referans: ' + res.data.name + ' (' + (lim - used) + ' hak kaldı)'; ok.style.display = 'block'; }
      }
    } else {
      if (er) { er.textContent = t('errRef'); er.style.display = 'block'; }
    }
  }, 400);
}

function copyRef() {
  if (!me || !me.member_code) { toast('Referans kodunuz yok'); return; }
  var url = location.href.split('?')[0] + '?ref=' + me.member_code;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function() { toast('Referans linki kopyalandı ✓'); });
}

async function doRegister() {
  var name = document.getElementById('regName').value.trim();
  var email = document.getElementById('regEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  var pw = document.getElementById('regPw').value;
  var phone = document.getElementById('regPhone').value.trim();
  var insta = document.getElementById('regInsta').value.trim();
  var refCode = document.getElementById('refInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  var err = document.getElementById('regErr');
  err.textContent = '';
  if (!name || !email || !pw || !phone) { err.textContent = t('errFields'); return; }
  if (pw.length < 8) { err.textContent = t('errPw'); return; }
  // Ref code given but invalid
  if (refCode && !refM) { err.textContent = t('errRef'); return; }
  var btn = document.getElementById('regBtn');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span id="regBtnTxt">GÖNDERİLİYOR...</span>';
  var pwHash = btoa(pw + email);
  var autoCode = 'NIP-MBR-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6).toUpperCase();
  var ex = await _SB.from('members').select('id').eq('email', email).single();
  if (ex.data) {
    err.textContent = 'Bu e-posta zaten kayıtlı';
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.innerHTML = '<span id="regBtnTxt">' + t('applyBtn') + '</span>';
    return;
  }
  // Referanslı → anında onay, referanssız → admin onayı
  var hasRef = refCode && refM;
  var status = hasRef ? 'approved' : 'pending';
  phone = formatPhoneForStorage(phone);
  var insertData = {
    name: name, email: email, password_hash: pwHash, phone: phone,
    instagram: insta || null, status: status, member_code: autoCode,
    referral_limit: 3, referral_used: 0
  };
  if (hasRef) {
    insertData.ref_code = refCode;
    insertData.ref_by = refM.name;
    insertData.ref_by_id = refM.id;
  }
  var ins = await _SB.from('members').insert(insertData).select().single();
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span id="regBtnTxt">' + t('applyBtn') + '</span>';
  if (ins.error) { err.textContent = 'Hata: ' + ins.error.message; return; }
  if (hasRef) {
    await _SB.from('members').update({ referral_used: (refM.referral_used || 0) + 1 }).eq('id', refM.id);
    localStorage.setItem('nip_me', ins.data.id);
    localStorage.setItem('nip_me_data', JSON.stringify(ins.data));
    me = ins.data;
    await enterCustomer();
    toast(t('welcome'));
  } else {
    // Admin onayı bekliyor
    G('s-pending');
  }
}

// ── CUSTOMER ──
function enterGuestMode() {
  // Hide member bar completely for guests
  var mb = document.getElementById('memberBar');
  if (mb) mb.style.display = 'none';
  var outBtn = document.getElementById('outBtn');
  if (outBtn) { outBtn.textContent = 'GİRİŞ YAP'; outBtn.onclick = showAuthModal; }
  // Reset name/phone labels and opacity for guest
  var lbName = document.getElementById('lbFName');
  if (lbName) lbName.innerHTML = '<span id="lbFNameTxt">İSİM SOYAD</span>';
  var lbPhone = document.getElementById('lbFPhone');
  if (lbPhone) lbPhone.innerHTML = '<span id="lbFPhoneTxt">TELEFON</span>';
  var fn = document.getElementById('fName'); if (fn) { fn.value=''; fn.style.opacity='1'; }
  var fp = document.getElementById('fPhone'); if (fp) { fp.value=''; fp.style.opacity='1'; }
  G('s-customer');
  loadEvents();
}

async function enterCustomer(lastPage) {
  var nb = document.getElementById('mbName'); if (nb) nb.textContent = me.name;
  var ob = document.getElementById('outBtn'); if (ob) { ob.textContent = 'ÇIKIŞ'; ob.onclick = doLogout; }
  var mb = document.getElementById('memberBar'); if (mb) mb.style.display = 'flex';
  var pb = document.getElementById('profileBtn'); if (pb) pb.style.display = 'inline-block';
  var fn = document.getElementById('fName'); if (fn) fn.value = me.name;
  var fp = document.getElementById('fPhone'); if (fp) fp.value = me.phone || '';
  var u = me.referral_used || 0, lim = me.referral_limit || 3;
  setText('refCount', (lim - u) + t('refLeft'));
  setText('refCopyBtn', t('copyRef'));
  await loadEvents();
  await loadAnn();
  loadNightsCount();
  G('s-customer');
}

async function openProfile() {
  G('s-profile');
  var score = me.score || 0;
  var scoreLabel = score >= 10 ? '⭐ SADAKATLİ ÜYE' : score >= 5 ? '✓ DÜZENLİ ÜYE' : score < 0 ? '⚠️ RİSKLİ' : '● YENİ ÜYE';
  document.getElementById('profileScoreNum').textContent = score;
  document.getElementById('profileScoreLabel').textContent = scoreLabel;
  document.getElementById('profileName').value = me.name || '';
  document.getElementById('profilePhone').value = me.phone || '';
  document.getElementById('profileInsta').value = me.instagram || '';
  document.getElementById('profilePw').value = '';
  document.getElementById('profileErr').textContent = '';
  var code = document.getElementById('profileCode');
  if (code) code.textContent = me.member_code || '—';
  var u = me.referral_used || 0, lim = me.referral_limit || 3;
  document.getElementById('profileRefs').textContent = u;
  document.getElementById('profileRefLeft').textContent = lim - u;
  // Load nights
  var res = await _SB.from('reservations').select('id,event_name,event_date,status').eq('member_id', me.id).order('event_date', {ascending: false});
  var data = res.data || [];
  var attended = data.filter(function(r){ return r.status === 'used'; });
  document.getElementById('profileNights').textContent = attended.length;
  // History
  var hist = document.getElementById('profileHistory');
  if (!attended.length) {
    hist.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Henüz katıldığın bir gece yok.</div>';
  } else {
    hist.innerHTML = '';
    attended.forEach(function(r) {
      var d = document.createElement('div');
      d.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #1a1a1a';
      d.innerHTML = '<span style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:1px">' + (r.event_name||'—') + '</span>' +
        '<span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#aaa">' + fmtDate(r.event_date) + '</span>';
      hist.appendChild(d);
    });
  }
}

async function saveProfile() {
  var name = document.getElementById('profileName').value.trim();
  var phone = document.getElementById('profilePhone').value.trim();
  var insta = document.getElementById('profileInsta').value.trim();
  var pw = document.getElementById('profilePw').value;
  var err = document.getElementById('profileErr');
  err.textContent = '';
  if (!name || !phone) { err.textContent = 'İsim ve telefon zorunlu'; return; }
  if (pw && pw.length < 8) { err.textContent = 'Şifre en az 8 karakter olmalı'; return; }
  phone = formatPhoneForStorage(phone);
  var upd = { name: name, phone: phone, instagram: insta || null };
  if (pw) upd.password_hash = btoa(pw + me.email);
  var res = await _SB.from('members').update(upd).eq('id', me.id).select().single();
  if (res.error) { err.textContent = 'Hata: ' + res.error.message; return; }
  me = res.data;
  localStorage.setItem('nip_me_data', JSON.stringify(me));
  localStorage.setItem('nip_me', me.id);
  // Update name in form
  var fn = document.getElementById('fName'); if (fn) fn.value = me.name;
  var fp = document.getElementById('fPhone'); if (fp) fp.value = me.phone;
  document.getElementById('mbName').textContent = me.name;
  toast('Bilgiler güncellendi ✓');
}

async function loadNightsCount() {
  if (!me) return;
  var res = await _SB.from('reservations').select('id').eq('member_id', me.id).eq('status', 'approved');
  var count = (res.data || []).length;
  var badge = document.getElementById('nightsBadge');
  if (badge && count > 0) {
    badge.textContent = count === 1 ? '1 gece' : count + ' gece';
    badge.style.display = 'inline';
    badge.title = 'Katıldığın gece sayısı';
  }
}

async function loadAnn() {
  var res = await _SB.from('settings').select('value').eq('key', 'announcement').single();
  if (res.data) {
    
    var at = document.getElementById('annTxt'); if (at) at.value = res.data.value;
  }
}

// ── EVENTS ──
async function loadEvents() {
  // Show skeleton while loading
  var tr = document.getElementById('cTrack');
  if (tr) {
    tr.innerHTML = '';
    for (var sk = 0; sk < 2; sk++) {
      var sc = document.createElement('div');
      sc.className = 'pc skeleton-card';
      sc.innerHTML = '<div class="skel-img"></div><div class="skel-meta"><div class="skel-line wide"></div><div class="skel-line narrow"></div></div>';
      tr.appendChild(sc);
    }
  }
  // Use local date to avoid UTC offset issues (Turkey = UTC+3)
  var now = new Date();
  var today = now.getFullYear() + '-' + String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(now.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
  // Load all events
  var now = new Date();
  var today = now.getFullYear() + '-' + String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(now.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
  var res = await _SB.from('events')
    .select('id,name,genre,rules,date,time,capacity,approved_count,poster_b64')
    .gte('date', today)
    .order('date', { ascending: true });

  if (res.error) {
    toast('Etkinlik yükleme hatası: ' + res.error.message);
    events = [];
  } else {
    events = res.data || [];
  }
  renderCarousel();
  // Posters already included in main query
}

async function loadPosters() {
  var res = await _SB.from('events')
    .select('id,poster_b64')
    .order('date', { ascending: true });
  if (!res.data) return;
  res.data.forEach(function(row) {
    if (!row.poster_b64) return;
    // Find matching event and update
    var evt = events.find(function(e) { return e.id === row.id; });
    if (evt) {
      evt.poster_b64 = row.poster_b64;
      // Update the card image if visible
      var card = document.querySelector('.pc[data-id="' + row.id + '"]');
      if (card) {
        var img = card.querySelector('img');
        if (img) {
          img.src = row.poster_b64;
        } else {
          // Replace placeholder with image
          var ph = card.querySelector('.pc-meta');
          if (ph) {
            var newImg = document.createElement('img');
            newImg.src = row.poster_b64;
            newImg.draggable = false;
            newImg.style.cssText = 'width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;object-fit:cover;display:block';
            card.insertBefore(newImg, ph);
            // Remove old placeholder div if exists
            var oldPh = card.querySelector('[style*="aspect-ratio"]');
            if (oldPh && oldPh !== newImg) oldPh.remove();
          }
        }
      }
    }
  });
}

function renderCarousel() {
  var tr = document.getElementById('cTrack');
  var dt = document.getElementById('cDots');
  if (!tr) return;
  tr.innerHTML = '';
  dt.innerHTML = '';
  ci = 0;
  if (!events.length) {
    console.log('[NIP] No events to show');
    tr.innerHTML = '<div class="empty" style="width:calc(100vw - 60px)">Etkinlik yok.</div>';
    return;
  }
  events.forEach(function(e, i) {
    var c = document.createElement('div');
    c.className = 'pc' + (selEvt === e.id ? ' sel' : '');
    c.dataset.id = e.id;
    c.onclick = function() { selE(e.id); };
    var inner = '';
    if (e.poster_b64) {
      inner += '<img src="' + e.poster_b64 + '" draggable="false">';
    } else {
      inner += '<div style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#0d0d0d"><span style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:24px;color:#2a2a2a">' + e.name + '</span></div>';
    }
    var daysLeft = Math.ceil((new Date(e.date + 'T00:00:00') - new Date()) / 86400000);
    var countdown = daysLeft > 0 ? (daysLeft === 1 ? 'Yarın' : daysLeft + ' gün kaldı') : '';
    inner += '<div class="pc-meta"><div class="pc-name">' + e.name + '</div>';
    inner += '<div class="pc-row">';
    if (e.genre) inner += '<span class="pc-genre">' + e.genre + '</span>';
    inner += '<span class="pc-date">' + fmtDate(e.date) + ' · ' + (e.time || '') + '</span>';
    if (countdown) inner += '<span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;margin-left:auto">' + countdown + '</span>';
    inner += '</div></div>';
    inner += '<div class="pc-ring"></div><div class="pc-chk">✓</div>';
    c.innerHTML = inner;
    tr.appendChild(c);
    var d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'c-dot' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    d.onclick = function() { ci = i; updC(); };
    dt.appendChild(d);
  });
  updC(false);
  setupSwipe();
}

function updC(anim) {
  if (anim === undefined) anim = true;
  var tr = document.getElementById('cTrack');
  var cs = tr.querySelectorAll('.pc');
  if (!cs.length) return;
  var cw = cs[0].offsetWidth + 10;
  tr.style.transition = anim ? 'transform .42s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)' : 'none';
  tr.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (ci * cw) + 'px)';
  document.querySelectorAll('.c-dot').forEach(function(d, i) {
    d.classList.toggle('active', i === ci);
  });
}

function setupSwipe() {
  var vp = document.getElementById('cVP');
  vp.ontouchstart = function(e) { sx = e.touches[0].clientX; drag = true; };
  vp.ontouchmove = function(e) { if (drag) e.preventDefault(); };
  vp.ontouchend = function(e) {
    if (!drag) return;
    drag = false;
    var dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - sx;
    if (dx < -40 && ci < events.length - 1) ci++;
    else if (dx > 40 && ci > 0) ci--;
    updC();
  };
}

function selE(id) {
  selEvt = id;
  var e = events.find(function(x) { return x.id === id; });
  document.querySelectorAll('.pc').forEach(function(c) {
    c.classList.toggle('sel', c.dataset.id === id);
  });
  var h = document.getElementById('cHint');
  h.textContent = '✓ ' + e.name + ' seçildi';
  h.className = 'c-hint ok';
  var en = document.getElementById('evtSelNone'); if (en) en.style.display = 'none';
  var ed = document.getElementById('evtSelDot'); if (ed) ed.style.display = 'block';
  var et = document.getElementById('evtSelTxt');
  if (et) {
    et.style.display = 'block';
    et.innerHTML = e.name + '<br><span style="font-size:9px;color:#ccc">' + fmtDate(e.date) + ' · ' + (e.time || '') + '</span>';
  }
  var nb = document.getElementById('evtNote');
  if (nb) { if (e.note) { nb.textContent = e.note; nb.style.display = 'block'; } else nb.style.display = 'none'; }
  var rw = document.getElementById('rulesWrap');
  var rt = document.getElementById('rulesText');
  var rc = document.getElementById('rulesCheck');
  if (rc) rc.checked = false;
  if (e.rules && rw && rt) { rt.textContent = e.rules; rw.style.display = 'block'; }
  else if (rw) rw.style.display = 'none';
  bounceHandle();
}

function bounceHandle() {
  var pill = document.getElementById('sheetPill');
  var hint = document.getElementById('sheetHint');
  if (pill) pill.style.background = 'var(--white)';
  if (hint) hint.style.color = 'var(--white)';
  setTimeout(function() {
    if (pill) pill.style.background = '';
    if (hint) hint.style.color = '';
  }, 1500);
  // Slide sheet up slightly to show it exists, then open fully
  var sheet = document.getElementById('resSheet');
  if (!sheet) return;
  sheet.style.transform = 'translateY(calc(100% - 80px))';
  sheet.style.transition = 'transform .3s ease';
  setTimeout(function() {
    sheet.style.transform = 'translateY(calc(100% - 52px))';
    setTimeout(function() {
      sheet.style.transform = '';
      sheet.style.transition = '';
    }, 300);
  }, 600);
}

function openSheet() {
  var sheet = document.getElementById('resSheet');
  if (sheet) sheet.classList.add('open');
}

function closeSheet() {
  var sheet = document.getElementById('resSheet');
  if (sheet) sheet.classList.remove('open');
}

function scrollToForm() {
  var sc = document.getElementById('s-customer');
  var sh = document.getElementById('resSheet');
  if (sc && sh) sc.scrollTo({ top: sh.offsetTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

function chgCnt(d) {
  cnt = Math.max(1, Math.min(20, cnt + d));
  document.getElementById('cntVal').textContent = cnt;
  renderGuestFields();
}

function renderGuestFields() {
  var wrap = document.getElementById('guestNamesWrap');
  if (!wrap) return;
  wrap.innerHTML = '';
  // i starts at 2 because person 1 is the member themselves
  for (var i = 2; i <= cnt; i++) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'f';
    var lbl = document.createElement('label');
    lbl.textContent = i + '. MİSAFİR ADI SOYADI';
    var inp = document.createElement('input');
    inp.className = 'fi';
    inp.type = 'text';
    inp.id = 'fGuest' + i;
    inp.placeholder = i + '. misafirin adı ve soyadı';
    div.appendChild(lbl);
    div.appendChild(inp);
    wrap.appendChild(div);
  }
}

// ── RESERVATION ──
async function doRes() {
  // If not logged in, show login/register modal
  if (!me) {
    showAuthModal();
    return;
  }
  var name = document.getElementById('fName').value.trim();
  var phone = document.getElementById('fPhone').value.trim();
  if (!selEvt) { toast('Lütfen bir etkinlik seçin'); return; }
  // Check duplicate reservation
  var dupCheck = await _SB.from('reservations')
    .select('id,status')
    .eq('member_id', me.id)
    .eq('event_id', selEvt)
    .neq('status', 'rejected')
    .single();
  if (dupCheck.data) {
    var st = dupCheck.data.status;
    if (st === 'pending') { toast('Bu etkinlik için zaten bekleyen bir rezervasyonunuz var.'); return; }
    if (st === 'approved') { toast('Bu etkinlik için zaten onaylı biletiniz var! 🎫'); return; }
    if (st === 'used') { toast('Bu etkinliğe zaten katıldınız.'); return; }
  }
  if (!name) { toast('İsim zorunludur'); return; }
  if (!phone) { toast('Telefon zorunludur'); return; }
  var rw = document.getElementById('rulesWrap');
  var rc = document.getElementById('rulesCheck');
  if (rw && rw.style.display !== 'none' && rc && !rc.checked) {
    rw.style.borderLeftColor = 'var(--red)';
    setTimeout(function() { rw.style.borderLeftColor = ''; }, 2000);
    toast('Lütfen etkinlik kurallarını onaylayın');
    return;
  }
  var e = events.find(function(x) { return x.id === selEvt; });
  var qrId = 'NIP-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6).toUpperCase();
  var btn = document.getElementById('subBtn');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span id="subBtnTxt">GÖNDERİLİYOR...</span>';
  // Collect all guest names (starting from 2nd person, 1st is the member)
  var guestNames = [];
  for (var gi = 2; gi <= cnt; gi++) {
    var gInp = document.getElementById('fGuest' + gi);
    if (gInp) {
      var gVal = gInp.value.trim();
      if (!gVal) { toast(gi + '. misafirin adını girin'); return; }
      guestNames.push(gVal);
    }
  }
  phone = formatPhoneForStorage(phone);
  var ins = await _SB.from('reservations').insert({
    qr_id: qrId, event_id: e.id, event_name: e.name,
    event_date: e.date, event_time: e.time, name: name, phone: phone,
    count: cnt, status: 'pending', member_id: me.id,
    member_code: me.member_code, rules_accepted: rc ? rc.checked : false,
    guest_name: guestNames.length > 0 ? guestNames.join(', ') : null
  }).select().single();
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span id="subBtnTxt">' + t('resBtn') + '</span>';
  if (ins.error) { toast('Hata: ' + ins.error.message); return; }
  // Go to tickets and show the new reservation
  await openTickets();
  toast('🎫 Rezervasyonunuz alındı! Onay bekleyiniz.');
}

// ── TICKETS ──
async function openTickets() {
  G('s-tickets');
  var el = document.getElementById('ticketsList');
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="page-spin"></div>';
  var res = await _SB.from('reservations').select('*').eq('member_id', me.id).order('created_at', { ascending: false });
  var data = res.data || [];
  var approvedCount = data.filter(function(r){ return r.status === 'approved' || r.status === 'used'; }).length;
  var nc = document.getElementById('ticketsNightCount');
  if (nc && approvedCount > 0) nc.textContent = approvedCount + ' gece';
  if (!data.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Henüz rezervasyon yok.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = '';
  data.forEach(function(r) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 't-card';
    var bMap = { pending: 'badge p', approved: 'badge a', rejected: 'badge r', used: 'badge u' };
    var bTxt = { pending: 'BEKLEMEDE', approved: 'ONAYLANDI', rejected: 'REDDEDİLDİ', used: 'KULLANILDI' };
    var hd = document.createElement('div'); hd.className = 't-card-head';
    var hn = document.createElement('span'); hn.className = 't-card-name'; hn.textContent = r.event_name || '—';
    var hb = document.createElement('span'); hb.className = bMap[r.status] || 'badge u'; hb.textContent = bTxt[r.status] || r.status;
    hd.appendChild(hn); hd.appendChild(hb); card.appendChild(hd);
    var bd = document.createElement('div'); bd.className = 't-card-body';
    var guestRow = '';
    if (r.guest_name) {
      var guests = r.guest_name.split(', ');
      guests.forEach(function(g, gi) {
        guestRow += '<div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">' + (gi+2) + '. MİSAFİR / GUEST</span><span class="t-card-val">' + g + '</span></div>';
      });
    }
    bd.innerHTML =
      '<div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">TARİH / DATE</span><span class="t-card-val">' + fmtDate(r.event_date) + ' · ' + (r.event_time||'') + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">ETKİNLİK / EVENT</span><span class="t-card-val">' + (r.event_name||'—') + '</span></div>' +
      '<div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">1. KİŞİ / GUEST 1</span><span class="t-card-val">' + r.name + '</span></div>' +
      guestRow +
      '<div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">TOPLAM / TOTAL</span><span class="t-card-val">' + r.count + ' kişi / pax</span></div>';
    card.appendChild(bd);
    if (r.status === 'approved') {
      var qz = document.createElement('div'); qz.className = 't-card-qr';
      var qw = document.createElement('div'); qw.style.cssText = 'background:white;padding:10px;border-radius:3px';
      qw.id = 'tqr-' + r.id;
      var qi = document.createElement('div'); qi.style.cssText = 'font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:3px;margin-top:6px'; qi.textContent = r.qr_id;
      var qb = document.createElement('div'); qb.style.cssText = 'font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:4px'; qb.textContent = '⚡ TEK KULLANIMLIK QR';
      // Takvime ekle butonu
      var calBtn = document.createElement('button');
      calBtn.style.cssText = 'margin-top:10px;background:none;border:1px solid #333;color:#ccc;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;width:100%';
      calBtn.textContent = '📅 TAKVİME EKLE';
      calBtn.onclick = (function(ev) { return function() { addToCalendar(ev); }; })(r);
      qz.appendChild(qw); qz.appendChild(qi); qz.appendChild(qb); qz.appendChild(calBtn);
      card.appendChild(qz);
      setTimeout(function() {
        var qel = document.getElementById('tqr-' + r.id);
        if (qel && !qel.hasChildNodes()) {
          new QRCode(qel, { text: r.qr_id, width: 160, height: 160, colorDark: '#000', colorLight: '#fff', correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.M });
        }
      }, 100);
    } else if (r.status === 'pending') {
      var pz = document.createElement('div'); pz.style.cssText = 'background:#07111a;border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.15);border-radius:3px;padding:14px;text-align:center;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2';
      pz.textContent = '⏳ ONAY BEKLENİYOR — Onaylandığında QR biletiniz burada görünecek.';
      var cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
      cancelBtn.style.cssText = 'margin-top:8px;background:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);color:var(--red);font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;width:100%';
      cancelBtn.textContent = '✕ REZERVASYONU İPTAL ET';
      cancelBtn.onclick = (function(rid){ return function(){ cancelRes(rid); }; })(r.id);
      pz.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
      pz.appendChild(cancelBtn);
      card.appendChild(pz);
    } else if (r.status === 'rejected') {
      var rz = document.createElement('div'); rz.style.cssText = 'background:#0f0806;border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.15);border-radius:3px;padding:14px;text-align:center;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--red);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2';
      rz.textContent = '✕ REZERVASYON REDDEDİLDİ';
      card.appendChild(rz);
    } else {
      var uz = document.createElement('div'); uz.style.cssText = 'background:#07111a;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:3px;padding:14px;text-align:center;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#ccc;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2';
      uz.textContent = '✓ BİLET KULLANILDI · ' + fmtDate(r.event_date);
      card.appendChild(uz);
    }
    el.appendChild(card);
  });
  if (resSub) _SB.removeChannel(resSub);
  resSub = _SB.channel('res-' + me.id)
    .on('postgres_changes', { event: 'UPDATE', schema: 'public', table: 'reservations', filter: 'member_id=eq.' + me.id },
      function() { openTickets(); toast('🎉 Rezervasyon durumunuz güncellendi!'); })
    .subscribe();
}

// ── ADMIN ──
async function doAdminLogin() {
  var user = document.getElementById('adminUser').value.trim();
  var pw = document.getElementById('adminPw').value;
  var err = document.getElementById('adminLoginErr');
  err.textContent = '';
  if (!user || !pw) { err.textContent = 'Kullanıcı adı ve şifre gerekli'; return; }
  var res = await _SB.from('settings').select('value').eq('key', 'admin_credentials').single();
  var creds = { username: 'Baycura', password: 'gulsenabdullah' };
  if (res.data && res.data.value) { try { creds = JSON.parse(res.data.value); } catch(e) {} }
  if (user !== creds.username || pw !== creds.password) { err.textContent = 'Geçersiz bilgiler'; return; }
  renderAdminStats(); renderRecM(); renderRecR(); loadAnn();
  G('s-admin');
}

function aTab(tab) {
  var tabs = ['ov','mb','ev','rs','qr'];
  document.querySelectorAll('.a-tab').forEach(function(x, i) { x.classList.toggle('active', tabs[i] === tab); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.a-panel').forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('active'); });
  document.getElementById('ap-' + tab).classList.add('active');
  if (tab === 'ov') { renderAdminStats(); renderRecM(); renderRecR(); }
  if (tab === 'mb') { renderMStats(); renderM(); }
  if (tab === 'ev') { renderEvts(); loadLastNote(); }
  if (tab === 'rs') { renderRes(); popFilter(); }
  if (tab !== 'qr') stopCam();
}

async function renderAdminStats() {
  var r1 = await _SB.from('members').select('status');
  var r2 = await _SB.from('reservations').select('status');
  var ms = r1.data || [], rs = r2.data || [];
  var pM = ms.filter(function(m) { return m.status === 'pending'; }).length;
  var aM = ms.filter(function(m) { return m.status === 'approved'; }).length;
  var pR = rs.filter(function(r) { return r.status === 'pending'; }).length;
  document.getElementById('admStats').innerHTML =
    '<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n gold">' + pM + '</div><div class="stat-l">BEKLEYEN ÜYE</div></div>' +
    '<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n g">' + aM + '</div><div class="stat-l">ONAYLANDI</div></div>' +
    '<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n o">' + pR + '</div><div class="stat-l">REZ. BEKL.</div></div>';
}

async function renderMStats() {
  var res = await _SB.from('members').select('status');
  var data = res.data || [];
  document.getElementById('mStats').innerHTML =
    '<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n gold">' + data.filter(function(m){return m.status==='pending';}).length + '</div><div class="stat-l">BEKLEYEN</div></div>' +
    '<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n g">' + data.filter(function(m){return m.status==='approved';}).length + '</div><div class="stat-l">ONAYLANDI</div></div>' +
    '<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n b">' + data.length + '</div><div class="stat-l">TOPLAM</div></div>';
}

async function renderRecM() {
  var res = await _SB.from('members').select('*').order('created_at', {ascending:false}).limit(5);
  renderMCards(res.data || [], 'recM');
}

async function renderM() {
  var q = _SB.from('members').select('*').order('created_at', {ascending:false});
  if (mF) q = q.eq('status', mF);
  var res = await q;
  renderMCards(res.data || [], 'mList');
}

function renderMCards(list, cid) {
  var el = document.getElementById(cid);
  if (!list.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Kayıt yok.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = '';
  list.forEach(function(m) {
    var bc = {pending:'p',approved:'a',rejected:'r',frozen:'f'}[m.status] || 'u';
    var bt = {pending:'BEKLEMEDE',approved:'ONAYLANDI',rejected:'REDDEDİLDİ',frozen:'DONDURULDU'}[m.status] || m.status;
    var card = document.createElement('div'); card.className = 'card';
    var hdr = document.createElement('div'); hdr.className = 'card-h';
    hdr.onclick = function() { this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open'); };
    var nd = document.createElement('div'); nd.style.cssText = 'flex:1;min-width:0';
    var ne = document.createElement('div'); ne.className = 'card-name'; ne.textContent = m.name;
    var mt = document.createElement('div'); mt.className = 'card-meta';
    mt.innerHTML = (m.email||'') + (m.phone ? ' · ' + m.phone : '') + '<br>' + (m.ref_by ? 'Ref: ' + m.ref_by : 'Direkt başvuru');
    var bg = document.createElement('span'); bg.className = 'badge ' + bc; bg.textContent = bt;
    nd.appendChild(ne); nd.appendChild(mt); hdr.appendChild(nd); hdr.appendChild(bg); card.appendChild(hdr);
    var body = document.createElement('div'); body.className = 'card-body';
    if (m.status === 'pending') {
      var b1 = document.createElement('button'); b1.className = 'act-btn approve'; b1.textContent = '✓ ONAYLA';
      b1.onclick = function() { appM(m.id); }; body.appendChild(b1);
      var b2 = document.createElement('button'); b2.className = 'act-btn reject'; b2.textContent = '✕ REDDET';
      b2.onclick = function() { rejM(m.id); }; body.appendChild(b2);
    }
    if (m.status === 'approved') {
      var bf = document.createElement('button'); bf.className = 'act-btn reject'; bf.textContent = '❄️ DONDUR';
      bf.onclick = function() { freezeM(m.id); }; body.appendChild(bf);
    }
    if (m.status === 'frozen') {
      var bu = document.createElement('button'); bu.className = 'act-btn approve'; bu.textContent = '▶ ÇÖZDÜR';
      bu.onclick = function() { appM(m.id); }; body.appendChild(bu);
    }
    var bd = document.createElement('button'); bd.className = 'act-btn reject';
    bd.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(255,0,0,.07);border-color:rgba(255,0,0,.2)';
    bd.textContent = '🗑 SİL'; bd.onclick = function() { deleteM(m.id, m.name); }; body.appendChild(bd);
    if (m.member_code) {
      var cb = document.createElement('div'); cb.className = 'code-box'; cb.textContent = m.member_code; body.appendChild(cb);
    }
    var det = document.createElement('div'); det.className = 'card-det';
    var scoreVal = m.score || 0;
    var scoreLabel = scoreVal >= 10 ? '⭐ SADAKATLİ' : scoreVal >= 5 ? '✓ DÜZENLI' : scoreVal < 0 ? '⚠️ RİSKLİ' : '● YENİ';
    det.textContent = 'Email: ' + (m.email||'—') + ' | Tel: ' + (m.phone||'—') + ' | IG: ' + (m.instagram||'—') + ' | Ref: ' + (m.ref_by||'Direkt') + ' | Hak: ' + (m.referral_used||0) + '/' + (m.referral_limit||3) + ' | Skor: ' + scoreVal + ' ' + scoreLabel;
    body.appendChild(det);
    if (m.status === 'approved') {
      var rr = document.createElement('div'); rr.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 0;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a';
      var rl = document.createElement('span'); rl.style.cssText = 'font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#ccc;flex:1'; rl.textContent = 'REFERANS HAKKI';
      var rm = document.createElement('button'); rm.style.cssText = 'width:28px;height:28px;background:#1a1a1a;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:var(--white);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px'; rm.textContent = '−';
      rm.onclick = function() { chgRef(m.id, (m.referral_limit||3), -1); };
      var rn = document.createElement('span'); rn.style.cssText = 'font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--white);min-width:24px;text-align:center'; rn.textContent = (m.referral_limit||3);
      var rp = document.createElement('button'); rp.style.cssText = 'width:28px;height:28px;background:#1a1a1a;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:var(--white);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px'; rp.textContent = '+';
      rp.onclick = function() { chgRef(m.id, (m.referral_limit||3), 1); };
      rr.appendChild(rl); rr.appendChild(rm); rr.appendChild(rn); rr.appendChild(rp); body.appendChild(rr);
    }
    card.appendChild(body); el.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function setMC(el2, s) { document.querySelectorAll('#mChips .chip').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active');}); el2.classList.add('active'); mF = s; renderM(); }

function genCode() { return 'NIP-MBR-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6).toUpperCase(); }

async function appM(id) {
  var code = genCode();
  await _SB.from('members').update({status:'approved', member_code:code}).eq('id', id);
  toast('Onaylandı → ' + code); renderMStats(); renderM(); renderAdminStats();
}
async function rejM(id) { await _SB.from('members').update({status:'rejected'}).eq('id', id); toast('Reddedildi'); renderM(); }
async function freezeM(id) { await _SB.from('members').update({status:'frozen'}).eq('id', id); toast('Donduruldu ❄️'); renderMStats(); renderM(); }
async function deleteM(id, name) {
  if (!confirm(name + ' silinsin mi?')) return;
  await _SB.from('members').delete().eq('id', id);
  toast(name + ' silindi'); renderMStats(); renderM(); renderAdminStats();
}
async function chgRef(id, cur, delta) {
  var nv = Math.max(0, cur + delta);
  await _SB.from('members').update({referral_limit: nv}).eq('id', id);
  toast('Referans hakkı → ' + nv); renderM();
}

// ── EVENTS ADMIN ──
async function renderEvts() {
  var res = await _SB.from('events').select('*').order('date', {ascending:true});
  var data = res.data || [];
  var list = document.getElementById('evtList');
  list.innerHTML = '';
  if (!data.length) { list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Etkinlik yok.</div>'; return; }
  var today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  data.forEach(function(e) {
    var pct = Math.round(((e.approved_count||0) / e.capacity) * 100);
    var past = e.date < today;
    var d = document.createElement('div'); d.className = 'ec';
    if (past) d.style.opacity = '.4';
    var top = document.createElement('div'); top.className = 'ec-top';
    var thumb = document.createElement('div'); thumb.className = 'ec-thumb';
    if (e.poster_b64) {
      var img = document.createElement('img'); img.src = e.poster_b64; thumb.appendChild(img);
    } else {
      var ph = document.createElement('div'); ph.className = 'ec-ph';
      var phsp = document.createElement('span'); phsp.textContent = e.name.slice(0,4); ph.appendChild(phsp); thumb.appendChild(ph);
    }
    var info = document.createElement('div'); info.className = 'ec-info';
    var en = document.createElement('div'); en.className = 'ec-name'; en.textContent = e.name + (past ? ' (geçti)' : '');
    var es = document.createElement('div'); es.className = 'ec-sub'; es.textContent = (e.genre||'') + ' · ' + fmtDate(e.date) + ' · ' + (e.time||'');
    var cr = document.createElement('div'); cr.className = 'cap-row';
    var cbg = document.createElement('div'); cbg.className = 'cap-bg';
    var cf = document.createElement('div'); cf.className = 'cap-fill' + (pct > 80 ? ' full' : pct > 60 ? ' warn' : ''); cf.style.width = pct + '%';
    var ct = document.createElement('span'); ct.className = 'cap-txt'; ct.textContent = (e.approved_count||0) + '/' + e.capacity;
    cbg.appendChild(cf); cr.appendChild(cbg); cr.appendChild(ct);
    info.appendChild(en); info.appendChild(es); info.appendChild(cr);
    top.appendChild(thumb); top.appendChild(info); d.appendChild(top);
    var acts = document.createElement('div'); acts.className = 'ec-acts';
    var ba = document.createElement('button'); ba.className = 'ec-act'; ba.textContent = '🖼 AFİŞ'; ba.onclick = function() { updEvtP(e.id); };
    var be = document.createElement('button'); be.className = 'ec-act'; be.textContent = '✏️ DÜZENLE'; be.onclick = function() { editEvt(e.id); };
    var bx = document.createElement('button'); bx.className = 'ec-act del'; bx.textContent = '✕ SİL'; bx.onclick = function() { delEvt(e.id, e.name); };
    acts.appendChild(ba); acts.appendChild(be); acts.appendChild(bx);
    d.appendChild(acts); list.appendChild(d);
  });
}

function compressImage(file, callback) {
  var maxW = 800, maxH = 1000, quality = 0.75;
  var img = new Image();
  var url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
  img.onload = function() {
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    var w = img.width, h = img.height;
    // Scale down if needed
    if (w > maxW || h > maxH) {
      var ratio = Math.min(maxW/w, maxH/h);
      w = Math.round(w * ratio);
      h = Math.round(h * ratio);
    }
    var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;
    var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);
    var compressed = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality);
    var origKB = Math.round(file.size / 1024);
    var compKB = Math.round(compressed.length * 0.75 / 1024);
    toast('Afiş sıkıştırıldı: ' + origKB + 'KB → ' + compKB + 'KB ✓');
    callback(compressed);
  };
  img.onerror = function() {
    // Fallback: read as-is
    var r = new FileReader();
    r.onload = function(e) { callback(e.target.result); };
    r.readAsDataURL(file);
  };
  img.src = url;
}

function onPoster(ev) {
  var f = ev.target.files[0]; if (!f) return;
  compressImage(f, function(compressed) {
    newP = compressed;
    document.getElementById('pPrev').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('pPrevImg').src = newP;
    document.getElementById('uZone').style.display = 'none';
  });
}
function rmP() { newP = null; document.getElementById('pPrev').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('uZone').style.display = 'block'; }

function updEvtP(id) {
  var inp = document.createElement('input'); inp.type = 'file'; inp.accept = 'image/*';
  inp.onchange = function(e2) {
    var f = e2.target.files[0]; if (!f) return;
    compressImage(f, async function(compressed) {
      await _SB.from('events').update({poster_b64: compressed}).eq('id', id);
      toast('Afiş güncellendi ✓');
      renderEvts();
    });
  };
  inp.click();
}

async function editEvt(id) {
  var res = await _SB.from('events').select('*').eq('id', id).single();
  var e = res.data; if (!e) return;
  document.getElementById('neName').value = e.name || '';
  document.getElementById('neGenre').value = e.genre || '';
  document.getElementById('neSub').value = e.subtitle || '';
  document.getElementById('neDate').value = e.date || '';
  document.getElementById('neTime').value = e.time || '';
  document.getElementById('neCap').value = e.capacity || 100;
  document.getElementById('neRules').value = e.rules || '';
  if (e.poster_b64) { newP = e.poster_b64; document.getElementById('pPrev').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('pPrevImg').src = e.poster_b64; document.getElementById('uZone').style.display = 'none'; }
  var btn = document.getElementById('addEvtBtn'); btn.textContent = 'ETKİNLİĞİ GÜNCELLE';
  btn.onclick = function() { updateEvt(id); };
  document.getElementById('ap-ev').scrollTop = 0;
  toast('Düzenleme modu — değiştir ve GÜNCELLE bas');
}

async function updateEvt(id) {
  var name = document.getElementById('neName').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  var date = document.getElementById('neDate').value;
  var cap = parseInt(document.getElementById('neCap').value);
  if (!name || !date || !cap) { toast('İsim, tarih ve kapasite zorunlu'); return; }
  var upd = { name:name, genre:document.getElementById('neGenre').value.trim(), subtitle:document.getElementById('neSub').value.trim(), date:date, time:document.getElementById('neTime').value, capacity:cap, rules:document.getElementById('neRules').value.trim() };
  if (newP) upd.poster_b64 = newP;
  await _SB.from('events').update(upd).eq('id', id);
  var btn = document.getElementById('addEvtBtn'); btn.textContent = 'ETKİNLİK OLUŞTUR'; btn.onclick = function() { addEvt(); };
  ['neName','neGenre','neSub','neDate','neRules'].forEach(function(x) { document.getElementById(x).value = ''; });
  document.getElementById('neCap').value = '100'; rmP();
  toast('Güncellendi ✓'); renderEvts(); if (me) loadEvents();
}

async function addEvt() {
  var name = document.getElementById('neName').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  var date = document.getElementById('neDate').value;
  var cap = parseInt(document.getElementById('neCap').value);
  if (!name || !date || !cap) { toast('İsim, tarih ve kapasite zorunlu'); return; }
  var btn = document.getElementById('addEvtBtn'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'OLUŞTURULUYOR...';
  var ins = await _SB.from('events').insert({ name:name, genre:document.getElementById('neGenre').value.trim(), subtitle:document.getElementById('neSub').value.trim(), date:date, time:document.getElementById('neTime').value, capacity:cap, approved_count:0, poster_b64:newP||null, rules:document.getElementById('neRules').value.trim() });
  btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'ETKİNLİK OLUŞTUR';
  if (ins.error) { toast('Hata: ' + ins.error.message); return; }
  ['neName','neGenre','neSub','neDate','neRules'].forEach(function(x) { document.getElementById(x).value = ''; });
  document.getElementById('neCap').value = '100'; rmP();
  toast(name + ' oluşturuldu ✓'); renderEvts(); if (me) loadEvents();
}

async function delEvt(id, name) {
  if (!confirm(name + ' silinsin mi?')) return;
  await _SB.from('events').delete().eq('id', id);
  toast(name + ' silindi'); renderEvts(); if (me) loadEvents();
}

async function loadLastNote() {
  var res = await _SB.from('events').select('rules').order('created_at', {ascending:false}).limit(1).single();
  if (res.data && res.data.rules) { document.getElementById('neRules').value = res.data.rules; toast('Son etkinlik kuralları yüklendi ✓'); }
}

// ── RESERVATIONS ──
async function popFilter() {
  var res = await _SB.from('events').select('id,name,date').order('date');
  var fe = document.getElementById('filterEvt');
  fe.innerHTML = '<option value="">Tüm Etkinlikler</option>';
  (res.data || []).forEach(function(e) { fe.innerHTML += '<option value="' + e.id + '">' + e.name + ' — ' + fmtDate(e.date) + '</option>'; });
}

async function renderRecR() {
  var res = await _SB.from('reservations').select('*').order('created_at', {ascending:false}).limit(6);
  renderRCards(res.data || [], 'recR');
}

async function renderRes() {
  var filter = document.getElementById('filterEvt').value;
  var list = document.getElementById('rList'); list.innerHTML = '<div class="page-spin"></div>';
  var q = _SB.from('reservations').select('*').order('created_at', {ascending:false});
  if (filter) q = q.eq('event_id', filter);
  if (rF) q = q.eq('status', rF);
  var res = await q;
  renderRCards(res.data || [], 'rList');
}

function renderRCards(list, cid) {
  var el = document.getElementById(cid);
  if (!list.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Kayıt yok.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = '';
  list.forEach(function(r) {
    var bc = {pending:'p',approved:'a',rejected:'r',used:'u'}[r.status] || 'u';
    var bt = {pending:'BEKLEMEDE',approved:'ONAYLANDI',rejected:'REDDEDİLDİ',used:'KULLANILDI'}[r.status] || r.status;
    var card = document.createElement('div'); card.className = 'card';
    var hdr = document.createElement('div'); hdr.className = 'card-h';
    hdr.onclick = function() { this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open'); };
    var nd = document.createElement('div'); nd.style.cssText = 'flex:1;min-width:0';
    var ne = document.createElement('div'); ne.className = 'card-name'; ne.textContent = r.name;
    var mt = document.createElement('div'); mt.className = 'card-meta'; mt.textContent = (r.event_name||'') + ' · ' + r.count + ' kişi · ' + (r.phone||'');
    var bg = document.createElement('span'); bg.className = 'badge ' + bc; bg.textContent = bt;
    nd.appendChild(ne); nd.appendChild(mt); hdr.appendChild(nd); hdr.appendChild(bg); card.appendChild(hdr);
    var body = document.createElement('div'); body.className = 'card-body';
    if (r.status === 'pending') {
      var b1 = document.createElement('button'); b1.className = 'act-btn approve'; b1.textContent = '✓ ONAYLA'; b1.onclick = function() { appR(r.id, r.event_id, r.count); }; body.appendChild(b1);
      var b2 = document.createElement('button'); b2.className = 'act-btn reject'; b2.textContent = '✕ REDDET'; b2.onclick = function() { rejR(r.id); }; body.appendChild(b2);
    }
    if (r.status === 'approved') {
      var bw = document.createElement('button'); bw.className = 'act-btn approve';
      bw.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(37,211,102,.1);color:#25d366;border-color:rgba(37,211,102,.3)';
      bw.textContent = '💬 WHATSAPP BİLDİR';
      bw.onclick = (function(res){ return function(){ sendWhatsApp(res); }; })(r);
      body.appendChild(bw);
    }
    var det = document.createElement('div'); det.className = 'card-det';
    var guestInfo2 = '';
    if (r.guest_name) { r.guest_name.split(', ').forEach(function(g,gi){ guestInfo2 += ' | '+(gi+2)+'. Kişi: '+g; }); }
    det.textContent = 'Tel: '+(r.phone||'—')+' | QR: '+(r.qr_id||'—')+' | '+fmtDate(r.event_date||'')+' | Kurallar: '+(r.rules_accepted?'Kabul':'—')+guestInfo2;
    body.appendChild(det); card.appendChild(body); el.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function setRC(el2, s) { document.querySelectorAll('#rChips .chip').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active');}); el2.classList.add('active'); rF = s; renderRes(); }

async function appR(id, evtId, count) {
  await _SB.from('reservations').update({status:'approved'}).eq('id', id);
  var ev = await _SB.from('events').select('approved_count').eq('id', evtId).single();
  if (ev.data) await _SB.from('events').update({approved_count:(ev.data.approved_count||0)+count}).eq('id', evtId);
  toast('Onaylandı ✓'); renderRes(); renderAdminStats();
  // Score: +1 for making reservation
  _SB.from('reservations').select('member_id').eq('id', id).single().then(function(r2) {
    if (r2.data && r2.data.member_id) {
      _SB.rpc('increment_score', {member_id_input: r2.data.member_id, delta: 1}).then(function(){});
    }
  });
  // Fetch reservation details and offer WhatsApp
  var res = await _SB.from('reservations').select('*').eq('id', id).single();
  if (res.data) {
    setTimeout(function(){ sendWhatsApp(res.data); }, 600);
  }
}
async function rejR(id) { await _SB.from('reservations').update({status:'rejected'}).eq('id', id); toast('Reddedildi'); renderRes(); }

// ── SETTINGS ──
async function saveAnn() {
  var val = document.getElementById('annTxt').value;
  await _SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'announcement', value:val});
  toast('Duyuru güncellendi ✓');
}
async function saveAdminCreds() {
  var user = document.getElementById('newAdminUser').value.trim();
  var pw = document.getElementById('newAdminPw').value;
  if (!user || !pw) { toast('Kullanıcı adı ve şifre gerekli'); return; }
  await _SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'admin_credentials', value:JSON.stringify({username:user, password:pw})});
  toast('Admin bilgileri güncellendi ✓');
  document.getElementById('newAdminUser').value = '';
  document.getElementById('newAdminPw').value = '';
}

// ── QR SCAN ──
async function startCam() {
  try {
    camStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({video:{facingMode:'environment',width:{ideal:640},height:{ideal:640}}});
    var v = document.getElementById('qrVideo'); v.srcObject = camStream; v.style.display = 'block'; v.play();
    document.getElementById('camOff').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('camOn').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('qrRes').style.display = 'none';
    camTimer = setInterval(scanFrame, 300);
  } catch(e) { toast('Kamera erişimi reddedildi'); }
}
function stopCam() {
  if (camStream) { camStream.getTracks().forEach(function(t) { t.stop(); }); camStream = null; }
  if (camTimer) { clearInterval(camTimer); camTimer = null; }
  var v = document.getElementById('qrVideo'); if (v) { v.style.display = 'none'; v.srcObject = null; }
  var co = document.getElementById('camOff'); if (co) co.style.display = 'block';
  var cn = document.getElementById('camOn'); if (cn) cn.style.display = 'none';
}
function scanFrame() {
  var v = document.getElementById('qrVideo');
  if (!v || v.readyState !== v.HAVE_ENOUGH_DATA) return;
  var c = document.getElementById('qrCanvas'); c.width = v.videoWidth; c.height = v.videoHeight;
  var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.drawImage(v, 0, 0, c.width, c.height);
  var img = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, c.width, c.height);
  var code = jsQR(img.data, img.width, img.height, {inversionAttempts:'dontInvert'});
  if (code && code.data && code.data.startsWith('NIP-')) { stopCam(); document.getElementById('qrInput').value = code.data; scanQR(); }
}
async function scanQR() {
  var inp = document.getElementById('qrInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  var res2 = document.getElementById('qrRes');
  if (!inp) { toast('QR kodu girin'); return; }
  res2.style.display = 'block'; res2.className = 'qr-res'; res2.innerHTML = '<div class="page-spin"></div>';
  var res = await _SB.from('reservations').select('*').eq('qr_id', inp).single();
  var r = res.data;
  if (!r) { res2.className = 'qr-res i'; res2.innerHTML = '<span class="qr-big">GEÇERSİZ</span>Kod bulunamadı.'; return; }
  if (r.status === 'used') { res2.className = 'qr-res u'; res2.innerHTML = '<span class="qr-big">KULLANILMIŞ</span>' + r.name + '<br>Bu bilet zaten kullanıldı.'; return; }
  if (r.status !== 'approved') { res2.className = 'qr-res i'; res2.innerHTML = '<span class="qr-big">ONAYSIZ</span>' + r.name + '<br>Henüz onaylanmamış.'; return; }
  await _SB.from('reservations').update({status:'used'}).eq('id', r.id);
  // Score: +2 for actually attending
  if (r.member_id) {
    _SB.rpc('increment_score', {member_id_input: r.member_id, delta: 2}).then(function(){});
  }
  res2.className = 'qr-res v'; res2.innerHTML = '<span class="qr-big">GİRİŞ ✓</span>' + r.name + '<br>' + (r.event_name||'') + ' · ' + r.count + ' kişi';
  document.getElementById('qrInput').value = '';
}

// ── UTILS ──
function fmtDate(s) {
  if (!s) return '';
  try { var d = new Date(s + 'T12:00:00'); return d.toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'}); } catch(e) { return s; }
}
function toast(msg) {
  var t2 = document.getElementById('toastEl');
  t2.textContent = msg; t2.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(function() { t2.classList.remove('show'); }, 2800);
}

// ── TELEFON NORMALIZE ──
function normalizePhone(inp) {
  var v = inp.value.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '');
  // Typing in progress - don't auto-format until enough digits
  if (v.length < 7) { inp.value = v; return; }
  // 05xx → +905xx
  if (v.match(/^05[0-9]{9}$/)) { v = '+9' + v; }
  // 5xx (no leading 0) → +905xx
  else if (v.match(/^5[0-9]{9}$/)) { v = '+90' + v; }
  // 905xx → +905xx
  else if (v.match(/^905[0-9]{9}$/)) { v = '+' + v; }
  // 00905xx → +905xx
  else if (v.startsWith('009')) { v = '+' + v.slice(2); }
  inp.value = v;
}

function formatPhoneForStorage(phone) {
  var v = (phone || '').replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '');
  if (v.match(/^05[0-9]{9}$/)) return '+9' + v;
  if (v.match(/^5[0-9]{9}$/)) return '+90' + v;
  if (v.match(/^905[0-9]{9}$/)) return '+' + v;
  if (v.startsWith('009')) return '+' + v.slice(2);
  return v; // already formatted or foreign number
}

// ── WHATSAPP BİLDİRİM ──
function sendWhatsApp(r) {
  var phone = (r.phone || '').replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '');
  // Normalize: ensure international format
  if (phone.startsWith('00')) phone = '+' + phone.slice(2);
  if (!phone.startsWith('+')) phone = '+90' + phone.replace(/^0/, '');
  phone = phone.replace('+', '');
  var guestLine = '';
  if (r.guest_name) {
    r.guest_name.split(', ').forEach(function(g, i) { guestLine += '%0A' + (i+2) + '. Kişi: ' + encodeURIComponent(g); });
  }
  var msg = encodeURIComponent('Merhaba ' + (r.name||'').split(' ')[0] + ',') +
    '%0A%0A' + encodeURIComponent('NOT IN PARIS rezervasyonunuz onaylandı! 🎉') +
    '%0A%0A' + encodeURIComponent('📅 ' + fmtDate(r.event_date) + ' · ' + (r.event_time||'')) +
    '%0A' + encodeURIComponent('🎫 ' + (r.event_name||'')) +
    '%0A' + encodeURIComponent('👤 1. Kişi: ' + (r.name||'')) +
    guestLine +
    '%0A' + encodeURIComponent('👥 Toplam: ' + r.count + ' kişi') +
    '%0A%0A' + encodeURIComponent('QR biletiniz uygulamada hazır. Kapıda gösteriniz.') +
    '%0A%0A' + encodeURIComponent('notinparis.me');
  window.open('https://wa.me/' + phone + '?text=' + msg, '_blank');
}

// ── REZERVASYON İPTAL ──
async function cancelRes(id) {
  if (!confirm('Rezervasyonunuzu iptal etmek istediğinizden emin misiniz?')) return;
  var res = await _SB.from('reservations').update({status: 'rejected'}).eq('id', id).eq('member_id', me.id);
  if (res.error) { toast('Hata: ' + res.error.message); return; }
  // Score: -1 for cancelling
  _SB.rpc('increment_score', {member_id_input: me.id, delta: -1}).then(function(){});
  toast('Rezervasyon iptal edildi');
  openTickets();
}

// ── TAKVİME EKLE ──
function addToCalendar(r) {
  var title = encodeURIComponent('NOT IN PARIS — ' + (r.event_name || ''));
  var date = (r.event_date || '').replace(/-/g, '');
  var time = (r.event_time || '22:00').replace(':', '') + '00';
  var start = date + 'T' + time;
  // End time: +4 hours
  var endH = parseInt(time.substr(0,2)) + 4;
  var endTime = (endH < 10 ? '0' : '') + endH + time.substr(2);
  var end = date + 'T' + endTime;
  var details = encodeURIComponent('Rezervasyon: ' + r.name + (r.guest_name ? ' + ' + r.guest_name : '') + '\nQR: ' + r.qr_id);
  // Try Google Calendar
  var url = 'https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE&text=' + title + '&dates=' + start + '/' + end + '&details=' + details;
  // Also create .ics for Apple Calendar
  var ics = 'BEGIN:VCALENDAR\nVERSION:2.0\nBEGIN:VEVENT\nDTSTART:' + start + '\nDTEND:' + end + '\nSUMMARY:NOT IN PARIS — ' + (r.event_name||'') + '\nDESCRIPTION:QR: ' + r.qr_id + '\nEND:VEVENT\nEND:VCALENDAR';
  var blob = new Blob([ics], {type:'text/calendar'});
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download = 'notinparis.ics';
  a.click();
  setTimeout(function(){ window.open(url, '_blank'); }, 500);
}

// ── REALTIME ──
_SB.channel('admin-rt')
  .on('postgres_changes', {event:'*',schema:'public',table:'members'}, function() {
    if (document.getElementById('ap-mb').classList.contains('active')) { renderMStats(); renderM(); }
    if (document.getElementById('ap-ov').classList.contains('active')) { renderAdminStats(); renderRecM(); }
  })
  .on('postgres_changes', {event:'*',schema:'public',table:'reservations'}, function() {
    if (document.getElementById('ap-rs').classList.contains('active')) renderRes();
    if (document.getElementById('ap-ov').classList.contains('active')) { renderAdminStats(); renderRecR(); }
  })
  .subscribe();

// ── AUTH MODAL ──
function showAuthModal() {
  var m = document.getElementById('authModal');
  if (m) { m.style.display = 'flex'; m.classList.add('show'); }
  var em = document.getElementById('modalEmail');
  if (em) em.focus();
}

function closeAuthModal() {
  var m = document.getElementById('authModal');
  if (m) { m.style.display = 'none'; m.classList.remove('show'); }
}

async function doModalLogin() {
  var email = document.getElementById('modalEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  var pw = document.getElementById('modalPw').value;
  var err = document.getElementById('modalErr');
  err.textContent = '';
  if (!email || !pw) { err.textContent = 'E-posta ve şifre gerekli'; return; }
  var btn = document.getElementById('modalLoginBtn');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span class="spin-el"></span><span>Giriş yapılıyor...</span>';
  var pwHash = btoa(pw + email);
  var res = await _SB.from('members').select('*').eq('email', email).eq('password_hash', pwHash).single();
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.innerHTML = '<span id="modalBtnTxt">GİRİŞ YAP</span>';
  var data = res.data;
  if (!data) { err.textContent = t('errInvalid'); return; }
  if (data.status === 'pending') { err.textContent = t('errPending'); return; }
  if (data.status === 'rejected') { err.textContent = t('errRejected'); return; }
  if (data.status === 'frozen') { err.textContent = t('errFrozen'); return; }
  localStorage.setItem('nip_me', data.id);
  localStorage.setItem('nip_me_data', JSON.stringify(data));
  me = data;
  closeAuthModal();
  // Update UI for logged-in state
  var mb2 = document.getElementById('memberBar'); if (mb2) mb2.style.display = 'flex';
  var mn = document.getElementById('mbName'); if (mn) mn.textContent = me.name;
  var fn = document.getElementById('fName'); if (fn) fn.value = me.name;
  var fp = document.getElementById('fPhone'); if (fp) fp.value = me.phone || '';
  var outBtn = document.getElementById('outBtn');
  if (outBtn) { outBtn.textContent = t('out'); outBtn.onclick = doLogout; }
  var u = me.referral_used||0, lim = me.referral_limit||3;
  var rc = document.getElementById('refCount'); if (rc) rc.textContent = (lim-u) + t('refLeft');
  // Now submit the reservation
  await doRes();
}

// ── REFRESH ──
function refreshApp() {
  var btn = document.querySelector('[onclick="refreshApp()"]');
  if (btn) { btn.style.transform = 'rotate(360deg)'; btn.style.transition = 'transform .5s ease'; setTimeout(function(){ btn.style.transform = ''; btn.style.transition = ''; }, 500); }
  loadEvents();
  if (me) { loadNightsCount(); loadAnn(); }
  toast('Yenilendi ✓');
}

// ── ADMİN GİZLİ GİRİŞ ──
var _adminTaps = 0, _adminTimer;
function adminTap() {
  _adminTaps++;
  clearTimeout(_adminTimer);
  if (_adminTaps >= 5) {
    _adminTaps = 0;
    G('s-admin-login');
  } else {
    _adminTimer = setTimeout(function(){ _adminTaps = 0; }, 1500);
  }
}

// ── SHEET SWIPE ──
(function(){
  var startY = 0, startX = 0, tracking = false;
  document.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e){
    var sheet = document.getElementById('resSheet');
    if (!sheet) return;
    // Only track touches that start on the sheet handle area or open sheet
    var touch = e.touches[0];
    startY = touch.clientY;
    startX = touch.clientX;
    tracking = true;
  }, {passive:true});

  document.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e){
    if (!tracking) return;
    var sheet = document.getElementById('resSheet');
    if (!sheet) return;
    var dy = e.touches[0].clientY - startY;
    var dx = Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientX - startX);
    // If horizontal movement is dominant, stop tracking (let carousel handle it)
    if (dx > Math.abs(dy) && dx > 10) { tracking = false; return; }
    // If sheet is open and user scrolls down, prevent default to avoid page scroll
    if (sheet.classList.contains('open') && dy > 0 && sheet.scrollTop === 0) {
      e.preventDefault();
    }
  }, {passive:false});

  document.addEventListener('touchend', function(e){
    if (!tracking) return;
    tracking = false;
    var sheet = document.getElementById('resSheet');
    if (!sheet) return;
    var dy = e.changedTouches[0].clientY - startY;
    var dx = Math.abs(e.changedTouches[0].clientX - startX);
    // Ignore if horizontal swipe
    if (dx > Math.abs(dy) || dx > 30) return;
    if (!sheet.classList.contains('open') && dy < -50) {
      openSheet();
    } else if (sheet.classList.contains('open') && dy > 80 && sheet.scrollTop === 0) {
      closeSheet();
    }
  }, {passive:true});
})();

// ── GERI TUŞU DESTEĞİ ──
window.addEventListener('popstate', function() {
  if (_pageStack.length > 0) {
    goBack();
  }
});
// Push initial state
history.pushState({}, '', location.href);

// ── START ──
boot();

</script>

</body>
</html>
